Comment: Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out approaching 500M, no clear run early in straight, blundered badly near 350M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover in the middle stages, wider turning in, weakened early in straight. (Roarer.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, no clear run early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped well from gate 9, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 400M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually close home.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, found rail 900M, 2 wide from 500M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to hold off the challengers. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened 200M, eased final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 600M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 400M, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 100M, weakened gradually close home.
Raced four wide in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, stayed on out wide.
Settled in mid-field, short of room when try to improve in home straight, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Shifted out and bumped at start, tracked leaders, switched for clear run on bend, stayed on steadily.
Four wide in rear of mid-field, taken wider on bend, stayed on well in tight finish.
Prominent, challenged winner top of home straight, closed on winner but always held.
Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, sticking to task.
Tracked leader against rail, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on well final 200m, lost second.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, challenged leaders 300m out, weakened final 100m.
Sluggish start, settled in rear of mid-field, forced to steady on heels 550m out, left behind home straight.
Made all, challenged by runner-up top of home straight, pressed by that rival to line and just prevailed in tight finish.
Stumbled leaving stalls, raced three wide in rear, keen early, briefly hampered 600m out, made up some late ground.
Dropped out from widest draw, good headway 400m out to 200m out, short of room final 200m, not fully extended.
Mid-field in rail position, race keenly throughout, unable to secure clear run until final 100m, unlucky.
Dropped out from wide draw, headway up rail on bend, short of room final 150m, not fully extended.
Sat towards rear, traveled greenly, switched out at the Turn, one pace to the line.
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, no clear run and could not be ridden out.
Sat behind midfield, traveled only fairly, not much impression made.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, raced rear, never a threat.
Settled midfield, raced wide, gave ground in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Chased the leader, traveled okay, gave ground inside 250M (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, settled in front of midfield, raced wide, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat on pace, kept on okay to hold 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield, minor progress made in the Straight.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, responded reasonably well under whip (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, led all the way to score.
Sat on pace, weakened slightly passing the 250M.
Jumped awkwardly, sat worse than midfield, responded nicely when asked near 150M (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, traveled keenly in the early stages, ran on evenly.
Tracked leader, no extra final 150m.
Recovered from slow start to race mid-division, rail position, ridden 300m out, weakened.
Dropped in from wide draw, still travelling comfortably turning into home straight but plenty to do, no impression under pressure.
Tracked pace, keen when hampered after 400m, lacked speed to challenge winner final 300m but stayed on for clear second.
Mid-field, forward move before halfway to race upsides leader, weakened quickly home straight.
Mid-field, pushed along halfway, dropped towards rear 300m out, no impression.
Rail position, tracked pace, ridden 400m out, one paced.
Held up from wide draw, ridden off bend with plenty to do, late headway, never dangerous.
Three wide in mid-field, effort 400m out, flattened out final 200m.
Raced wide towards rear, good headway into third 150m out, no further impression on front two late on.
Broke well from wide draw, across to make running, quickened over 300m out, in control final 200m.
Mid-field, ridden when short of room and switched 300m out, unable to quicken and little impression after.
Held towards rear, pushed along 400m out, no impression until passing a few rivals late on.
Held up, never out of rear, held when short of room 50m out.

Slightly slow out and made contact, raced at rear on the outside, travelled keenly throughout the early and middle stages, hung in and proved difficult to ride in the straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, last turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 250M, kept on evenly to the line.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers late.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Slightly slow out, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run until approaching final 50M, made some progress thereafter.

Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with no cover behind midfield, moved closer after passing 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 850M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, weakened early in straight. (Lame left front leg.)
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide approaching 550M, bumped 400M, kept on evenly in straight.
Fast into stride, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, bumped near 400M, closed off well to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Out with rest, raced in 2nd, challenged the leader turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, found rail near 1300M, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly until blocked approaching final 100M., eased thereafter.
Sat last on the rail, held up early part of the Straight, ran on nicely once in the clear.
Sat outside the lead, weakened final furlong. (Performance disappointing, must trial)
Sat midfield 2 wide, made little impression
Taken back from the outside draw, sat towards the rear 3 wide, made no ground. (See Incident Report)
Caught 3 wide no cover near midfield, hampered in the Straight, gave ground soon after. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, lay in and never seriously tested
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, made good ground until run peaked at final 100M.
Sat at the rear 2 wide, stayed on nicely.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, closed off strongly in the Straight.
Sent forward to lead, weakened and gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear, made some late ground.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, no clear run top of the Straight, closed off okay afterwards.
Sat behind the leaders, only one pace when asked.
Held up in rear of midfield on rail, commenced move upon straightening quickening well to hit the front just inside the 200M, hung on well under pressure.
Taken well behind from the widest draw and waited with, remained in last into straight, baulked for a run over 200M out, finished off the race well.
Began well from a poor draw, gradually settled 2-wide in front over 1200M out, ceded advantage for 2nd 1000M out, weakened under pressure inside final 300M.
Began moderately but soon recovered to forward of midfield along the rail, just over 3L back in 5th coming onto home bend, weakened under pressure shortly after straightening.
Settled in last few, saved ground turning in for home, produced good impression under pressure until 100M out.
Settled towards rear mainly 3-wide with cover, switched wider into straight, kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in rear of midfield, slightly worse into home straight, inconvenienced over 250M out, kept on steadily without threatening.
Broke well, settled some 2L back in 3rd on rail, angled out for a run 600M out approaching final turn, hit the front briefly about 300M out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well, settled in midfield, did not find much room early in straight until over 250M out, kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well, gradually settled 3-wide in worse than midfield with cover, quickened under pressure over 200M out reaching 2nd 100M out but never threatened the winner.
Settled well behind and waited with, inconvenienced behind runner just inside 400M, ran on well under pressure near the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Ridden along improving steadily to take up running over 1000M out in fast tempo, led until joined early in straight, overhauled inside final 300M.
Pressed forward from a wide draw settling over 2L back in 4th, 4-wide into straight and inconvenienced 400M out, folded up quickly.
Settled in forward of midfield 3-wide without cover, went slightly wider into straight, kept on under pressure until finding no extra 250M out.
From draw 1 took up a handy position just behind leaders, fought hard under top weight in the straight but couldn't quicken enough to be a threat.
Commenced well, led early stages before taking up a trailing position behind leaders, loomed a threat 300M, fought on well towards the line for 4th.
Jumped on terms, settled ahead of midfield about 3Ls off the fast pace, kept responding under pressure in the straight and got up in the final strides.
Chased leader, challenged seriously for the lead top of straight, held 2nd until nearing 100M, no extra late stages lost several places.
Jumped fairly from draw 11, taken back to last 7-8Ls off the pace middle stages, wide into straight before closing off nicely to take 3rd. Nearest finish.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, raced keenly middle stages, checked 700M, responded fairly to riding final 400M and was never a threat to leaders. (Blood in trachea.)
Slightly slow away, settled near last, switched widest 600M before closing off fairly in the straight.
Caught racing 3-wide without cover in mid-division, pushed along 500M but failed to run on.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear along the inside, 5Ls to make up 400M but couldn't muster the pace to challenge.
Jumped awkwardly, held up behind midfield, swung wide from 500M, kept on steadily to the line without posing serious threat to leaders.
Jumped only fairly, settled down in midfield, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened rapidly to finish last. (No Vet findings.)

Went forward from draw 12 but had to make some use to obtain the lead from rivals, went very fast 1200M to 900M, held off pursuing rivals well in the run home and was only headed in the final strides.
Pushed up to track leaders, well placed into home straight, dropped away quickly 200m out, found bled.
Rail position in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Shifted in and bumped at start, not best of runs 400m out to 200m out when trying to improve, forced to steady 150m out, not fully extended.
Raced in rear, pushed along wide into home straight, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, stayed on well.
Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly to 400m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Showed good speed to get across and pressed leader, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, won readily.

Three wide in rear of mid-field without cover, smooth headway on bend, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, lost balance when rider placed significant pressure to his left rein 200m out, stayed on strongly.
Ridden along from outside draw to lead, soon challenged and headed by winner top of home straight, faded final 100m.
Slowly away, rail position in rear of mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, eased when detached 200m out, found bled.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well final 200m.
Bumped shortly after start, mid division, switched for clear run top of home straight, stayed on well and just lost second.
Settled in mid-field, under pressure to maintain position from over 800m out, never a factor.
Held up last after sluggish start, still in last place top of home straight, headway up rail early part of home straight, tight of room final 100m.
Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, tracked pace, switched on bend, stayed on steadily but unable to reach leaders.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight.
Began well, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Out with rest, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 3-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on outer, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear but trapped 4 wide, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer turning in, showed very good response in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped awkwardly and unbalanced, raced 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Began well, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, kept on evenly final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield, easy run on turn, showed limited response in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, twice bumped 400m out to 350m out to look for clear run, stayed on for pressure from 250m.
In rear after bumped out of stalls, forced to wait for run 400m out to 250m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Dropped out from widest draw, still plenty to do top of home straight, ran on well final 200m, tight of room 100m out.
Tracked leader, improved to chase leader after 800m, driven 350m out, weakened final 100m.
Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, shuffled back, still in last place top of home straight, switched widest 250m out, ran on strongly final 200m.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, mid division, twice bumped 400m out to 350m out, stayed on well but no threat to winner.
Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly to quicken 350m out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there, won cosily.
Tracked leader, taken wider on bend, under pressure 350m out, flattened out final 100m.
Crowded shortly after start, waited with towards rear, pushed along widest into home straight, short-lived effort 300 out, unable to sustain.
Rail position in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, ran on well to close on winner late on but always held.
Raced in touch with leaders, well placed into home straight, challenged and every chance from 300m out, unable to quicken.
Bumped leaving stalls, three wide in rear of mid-field, raced keenly throughout, shifted out when steadied 600m out, lost touch final 200m.
Bumped and lost balance out of stalls, three wide in mid-field without cover, dropped away quickly 300m out.
Showed speed to get across, pressed on 300m out, headed by winner 150m out, flattened out final 100m.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced prominently on the outside, 1-1/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, angled out approaching 550M, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Began well, raced 3 wide behind midfield, wider after passing 550M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, headed final 50M, finished 3rd.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, no clear run until approaching 150M, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed no response early in straight, weakened final 300M, eased final 150M.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, made some progress thereafter.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Taken from the widest draw, raced at rear on outer, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began smartly, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 900M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (Bled.)
Settled in rear of mid-field, challenged up rail from 300m out, strong run to lead 100m out, won cosily.
Raced in mid division, short-lived effort 300m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Prominent, pushed up to lead 400m out, ran on well but joined by winner 100m out, no match for winner.
Waited with towards rear, unable to secure clear run until final 150m, ran on well but out of time.
Raced in rear of mid-field and towards centre of course, effort 400m out, one paced under pressure.
Bumped heavily out of stalls and lost balance, recovered to race prominently, driven 400m out, dropped away quickly 200m out.
Pressed leader, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, weakened final 200m.
Pressed in front, unable to hold position by halfway and dropped away quickly, eased when detached 200m out.
Tracked pace, switched towards centre of course for clear run 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Settled in mid-field, did not get best of runs final 300m when trying to improve, stayed on but no threat to leaders.
Tracked leaders towards centre of course, struggled to hold position from 400m out, lost touch final 100m.
Held up last after bumped heavily out of stalls and lost balance, ridden along 400m out but detached, never involved.
Raced in rear, forced to steady 300m out when trying to improve, unable to recover.
Sat towards rear, ran on evenly.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear on the rail, switched out entering the Straight, made steady progress to the line.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, traveled greenly, not much impression made.
Jumped awkwardly, sat behind midfield, lay out at the Straight, proved difficult to ride out.
Sat on pace, traveled strongly, had every chance.
Settled midfield, raced wide, limited under pressure (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield, gave ground from the Turn, failed to respond.
Chased the leader, reluctant to improve, gave ground from 250M (See Incident Report, Disappointing Performance, Must BT).
Ridden along to lead, weakened gradually in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled okay, responded reasonably well when asked.
Settled handy, traveled comfortably, responded nicely when asked.
Disputed lead, faded final 200m.
In rear after blundering leaving stalls, keen, driven along into home straight, some late headway, never dangerous.
Chased along early to take up prominent position, lost place from halfway, well beaten.
Tracked pace, three wide bend, challenged 300m out, no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, niggled to hold position, lost place halfway, never dangerous.
Disputed lead, weakened 200m out.
Very wide throughout, towards rear, lost touch 350m out.
Quickly recovered from sluggish start to track leaders, nudged along to lead 200m out, soon in control, won readily.
Mid-field, stayed on for pressure from 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-division, unable to improve under pressure over 400m out, weakened final 200m.
Held up from wide draw, struggling and well beaten from top of home straight.
Towards rear, good headway 300m out, no danger to winner but stayed on well to take second final 100m.

Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly, made contact with the right side of its starting gate and lost ground, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, failed to make any progress in straight.
Away with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, took the early lead, headed 1150M, allowed rival to cross near 950M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 9, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, angled out 550M, same margin back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 950M, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored. (Rider dropped whip passing 250M.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently, took the lead 1150M, headed near 950M, 2nd on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 5-1/4L back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began well from the widest draw, tracked leaders on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, angled out early in straight, cleared 250M but only showed limited response, one-paced final 150M.
Sat near the rear, never threatened.
Sat towards rear early and caught wide, ridden forward from the 1050M to be on pace 3 wide no cover, weakened from the 200M.
Settled midfield on the rail, angled out turning for home, ran on strongly to score
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, ran on ordinary.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, no clear run top of the Straight, ran on okay once in the clear.
Settled worse than midfield 4 wide no cover, stayed on okay.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide, ran on nicely.
Sent forward to lead, kept on until weakened final 100M.
Settled at the rear, switched out top of Straight, stay on well. (See Incident Report)
Sat at the rear, never involved.
Sat behind the leaders, made no ground.
Sat towards the rear on the rail, race greenly in the Straight, never a threat.
Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, made no impression.
Sat outside the lead, limited response when asked.
Settled within 3L of pace mainly in 4th, commenced move on top of home bend 650M out, gained upper hand under pressure 200M out, won cozily.
Slightly slow out but soon recovered to 4th just over 2L back, gained 3rd on rail over 1000M out, in similar position when 4th into straight, did not find much room early on, kept on to the line.

Broke well from a poor draw and soon taken back to 5th some 4L back, drifted slightly further back to 7th home bend, renewed effort entering straight obtaining a clear run 400M out, reached within 2L of lead 200M out but run soon ended.
Chased leader 2-wide, hit the front narrowly early in straight, headed by eventual winner 200M out, fought on dourly to the line.
Began fairly, settled in rear of midfield on rail in 4L 6th or 5th, did not find much room behind runners on rail early in straight, kept on to the line in closing stages.
Refused to settle without cover 3-wide behind midfield, made headway around the field rounding home bend, one of the widest turning into straight, soon weakened.
Soon took up running, obtained rails run about 1000M out, led until headed over 300M out, folded up quickly inside final 150M.
Soon taken behind from a poor draw, commenced move 4-wide rounding home bend, unbalanced briefly on straightening, ran on under pressure but run ended just inside the 100M.
Settled towards rear, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend, tightened and forced to switch inside 400M out, inconvenienced again just inside the 200M, finished off the race well.
Settled in last few on rail, one of the last turning into straight, did not find much room until the 130M, produced good late impression under pressure.
Jumped on terms, raced just off leaders, couldn't quicken under top weight passing 400M, out of contention 200M from home.
Soon led along the stand rail after a clean jump, broke away from the field passing 400M, kept on strongly to the line for a wide margin victory. (Jockey fined for returning 2 lbs overweight.)
Settled down midfield not far off the leaders, held up for clear running near 200M then raced tight 150M before responding fairly late stages.
Settled near last after the jump, switched to center of track 400M then closed off the race fairly well. (Jockey - rode in a conservatively manner with the expected fast pace.)
Jumped on terms, settled down midfield towards the center of field, driven halfway and improved to 2nd near 200M, lacked the extra to challenge late stages.
Began well enough, settled towards the rear early stages before improving position 450M, fought on steadily to 150M then faded.
Held up in midfield with cover, couldn't keep up with rivals passing 400M, soon beaten.
Jumped awkwardly, settled back in the field, badly held up for clear running from 500-150M before closing off strongly to take 2nd beaten 3L by the runaway winner.
Jumped only fairly, soon taken back to last 5Ls, failed to run on passing halfway. Never in the picture.
Began well and settled just off leader, came under pressure 500M, lost 2nd inside 250M then weakened away badly.
Chased leaders along the stand rail, couldn't pick up pace when the race got serious halfway, weakened to last. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in mid-field, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, stayed on well but no threat to winner.
Tracked pace out wide, struggled to hold position 550m out, dropped away quickly final 300m.
Bumped exiting stalls, held up, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
Tracked pace out wide, under pressure to hold position 600m out, never a threat but not beaten far.
Driven along and outpaced early stages, eased when detached 600m out, never involved.
Rail position in mid-field, improved against rail on bend to chase leaders, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Mid-field on outer, wide into home straight, short-lived effort 400m out, no extra and gave ground final 200m.
Jumped well, raced prominently, good progress to press leader 700m out, kicked two lengths clear 200m out, won readily.
Waited with towards rear, ridden on bend to chase leaders, unable to quicken.
Bumped leaving stalls, in rear out wide, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well final 200m.
Shifted out and heavily bumped out of stalls, showed speed to recover and lead, headed by winner top of home straight and dropped away quickly.
Heavily bumped out of stalls and lost balance, settled in rear of mid-field, followed runner-up through 400m out, stayed on for pressure.
Fast into stride, raced 3 wide with cover better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, one-paced final 150M.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, found daylight 300M, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on strongly in straight, won by 2 lengths.
Away with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, angled out approaching 450M, made good progress in straight to take a place, just missed 2nd.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, last turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Settled in mid-field, keen early, ridden top of home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Wide in mid-field without cover, struggled to hold position top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
Waited with in rear, headway up rail 800m out, running into trouble 250m out, lost all chance and allowed to coast home.
Held up last and detached early stages, caught up to main body of runners after 800m, headway into mid-field in home straight.
Tracked leaders, taken wider 500m out, short-lived challenge top of home straight, faded final 200m.
Tracked pace out wide, improved to lead 1100m out, headed by winner 300m out and dropped away quickly.
Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, briefly hampered 300m out, stayed on but unable to reach leaders.
Settled in rear of mid-field, twice hampered 450m out to 350m out when trying to improve out wide, some late gains.
Tracked pace out wide, improved to press leader 900m out, weakened quickly home straight, tight of room 250m out.
In rear after awkward start and lost balance, raced wide throughout, bumped 450m out, no impression.
Made early running, headed after 500m, remained handy, switched for clear run 500m out, unable to match front two but stayed on for clear third.
Rail position in mid-field, short of room behind leaders early in home straight and hampered 200m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Raced in rear of mid-field, keen 800m out and shuffled back, good headway from top of home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly and quickened early in home straight, strong run to lead 300m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.

Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, made slight contact near 500M, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, closer after passing 700M, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 650M, checked near 500M, made little progress in straight.
Began only fairly, raced at rear, hard ridden approaching 550M, 5 to 6 lengths back at 400M, closed off well without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 650M, closer on turn, kept on well in straight but always just held.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear of midfield, 2 wide, closer on turn, made some progress in straight without threatening.

Shifted out shortly after start, 2nd in the early and middle stages, travelled keenly and lost position near 700M, raced slightly better than midfield on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved closer after passing 850M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
Began well from gate 10, raced 3 wide behind midfield, sent forward after passing 850M, took the lead near 600M, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 400M, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 600M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, ridden along to press leader,struggled to hold position from 300m out, eased when jockey was concerned about its action.
Stood flat-footed at start and lost ground, caught up to main body of runners after 700m, widest into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
Rail position in mid-field, followed winner through 300m out, stayed on but crossed by runner-up 50m out.
Crowded and impeded shortly after leaving stalls, held up, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
Badly crowded shortly after start, settled in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run until 250m out, never a threat.
Pressed in front, ridden top of home straight, headed by winner 200m out, eased when jockey was concerned about its action.
Severely checked when crowded shortly after start and lost ground, outpaced and detached throughout, never involved.
Settled in mid-field, ridden along out wide final bend to chase leaders, short-lived effort 300m out, no extra final 100m.
Tracked pace, well placed into home straight, challenged and every chance from 300m out, one paced and unable to reach leaders.
Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Bumped and lost balance shortly after leaving stalls, raced in rear, chased along final bend, ran on strongly final 200m.
Fast break, tracked leaders, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, strong run to lead 200m out, in control final 100m.
Settled towards rear, held up for clear running until 150M, closed off fairly.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly.
Ridden along to lead, weakened inside 250M, never a threat (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat behind midfield, held up in the early Straight, responded nicely after obtaining clear running.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, made steady progress.
Settled midfield, raced keenly in the early and middle stages, finished off ordinarily.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, pressed on passing 500M, switched out, responded reasonably well when asked.
Jumped awkwardly, chased the leader, gave ground entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, hung out badly throughout, tailed out, no contention (Unacceptable Performance and Racing Manners, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Settled worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, dashed on inside 100M.
Sat handy, traveled fairly, gave ground quickly in the Straight (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
Taken back from wide draw, very wide on bend, stayed on final 200m, never nearer.
Tracked leader, rail position, pushed along 300m out, weakened.
Raced in touch with leaders, followed runner-up through 200m out, quickened past that rival to lead close home, won cosily.
Mid-field, failed to settle, headway four wide into home straight, on heels of leaders 150m out, unable to sustain effort.
Held up, ridden 300m out, stayed on final 150m, never dangerous.
Wide in mid-field, pushed along and lost place 400m out, soon well held.
In touch with leaders, keen after checked early, quickened to lead 150m out, ran on well, headed close home.
Held up, pushed along 300m out and no impression, never out of rear.
Tracked leader, challenged briefly 200m out, no extra.
Towards rear of mid-field, troubled passage when looking to improve towards rail over 200m out, stayed on once clear final 100m, took third close home.
Waited with towards rear, headway 300m out, one paced and unable to challenge.
Started well and across from wide draw to make running, headed 150m out, no extra.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, hard ridden after passing 450M, wide into straight, kept on same pace in the run home.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, won by 1-1/2L.
Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 450M, bumped near 250M, finished off strongly to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, very wide turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on outer, moved closer after passing 1200M, 2nd in the middle stages, 2 wide, bumped 300M, peaked near 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began awkwardly, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths back, angled out 350M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move after passing 500M, 1-1/2L back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly, lost two places towards finish.

Bumped heavily on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, kept on evenly inside final furlong.
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind the leaders, kept on in the Straight.
Sat at rear, never a threat.
Sat last 3 wide, never involved.
Settled midfield 2 wide, unable to quicken.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, stayed on late.
Sat off midfield on the rail, limited response when asked.
Sat at the rear 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Sat off pace, closed off okay.
Hard ridden and sent forward, led, kept on until weakened final 75M.
Sat midfield on the rail, made no impression.
Sat just in front of midfield on the rail, ran on nicely when asked.
Settled towards the rear, made minor progress.
Amongst leaders very wide after beginning from a poor draw, gradually shifted one back after first 300M but remained wide without cover, some 2L back 4-wide turning in for home and faded steadily.
Settled at the back early stages, keen between runners when tightened and lost position about 500M out, saved ground turning in for home, ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in last few on rail after moderate start, saved ground turning in for home hugging the rail, made no further impression in straight and soon faded. (Lame next day)
Soon drifted well back from a poor draw, trailed the field most of the way to straight, made some late impression closing stages.
Settled 3-wide without cover behind midfield, one of the widest when further away turning in for home, ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well from a poor draw sharing early pace, gradually drifted one back 2-wide after first 300M, slightly further off the lead rounding home bend, weakened noticeably upon straightening.

With leaders early from the widest draw, soon taken some 3L back in midfield 3-wide with cover, further away when one of the widest turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 50M.
Well there from a low draw, snatched up when crossed on rail 600M out, angled out from 2L 3rd 450M out for a clear run into straight but could only keep on at the one pace without quickening.
Jostled at start from a poor draw, took up running 4-wide about 700M out, shifted closer to rail 2-wide onto home bend, headed upon straightening and swamped for a placing inside final 100M.

Jumped fairly but soon recovered to share early pace, inconvenienced on rail just behind leader 500M out, snuck up to hit the front on straightening but unable to sustain effort and headed just inside the 50M.
Niggled along behind midfield, in similar position into straight, kept on at the same pace without quickening under pressure.
Jumped fairly settling in midfield on rail, soon came to challenge under pressure upon straightening, gained upper hand 50M out.

Did not show sufficient pace to obtain an on pace position as intended, raced ungenerously when being steadied to obtain cover, ended up in last making the home turn, did best work final 200M but was left with too much to do.
Soon in front setting steady pace, kept on well under pressure final 300M and gamely held on from pursuing rivals late.
Settled down midfield, briefly held up for clear running making the Home Turn, ran on steadily to the line after obtaining clear running. Nearest finish. (Jockey dropped whip 150M.)
Moved up to race just outside the lead, challenged the leader seriously in the home straight but was always held.
Make some use in the early stages to take up a position with cover behind leading pair, couldn't sustain run mid-straight before weakening. (No Vet findings.)
Reserved behind midfield, 3-4Ls behind leader turning for home, ran on one paced and didn't get involved in the finish.
Dropped back to race at the rear, over 5Ls to make up 400M, closed off well to claim 5th not beaten far.
Jumped only fairly, taken across to the fence racing towards the rear, failed to run on final 250M.

Raced ungenerously when being steadied to attempt to obtain cover early stages, unable to do so and raced wide without cover behind midfield, couldn't accelerate enough on straightening. No threat to leaders.
Jumped on terms, dropped back to race in midfield, came under pressure 500M and couldn't go on leaving 300M.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced near last about 6Ls off the pace, kept on one paced final 300M and didn't pose much threat to leaders.
Jumped only fairly, chased leaders on inside, quickened up well early straight to challenge leader, tried hard but was held over final stages.
Dropped out swiftly from widest draw, pushed along wide 500m out, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
Settled in rear of mid-field, headway out wide final bend to chase leaders, short-lived effort top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
Rail position in mid-field, chased along final bend, tight of room 400m out to 200m out and lost balance 250m out, weaved through field to lead final 50m.
Crowded and heavily bumped out of stalls, set strong pace, headed 600m out, dropped away quickly in home straight, eased once held.
Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, briefly impeded 500m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 300m out.
Bumped shortly after start, tracked leaders, commenced move out wide 600m out, sustained headway to challenge 300m out, weakened final 100m.
Held up after crowded leaving stalls, had to wait for run turning into home straight, tight of room 100m out, stayed on well to close on leaders.
Across and chased leader from wide draw, struggled to hold position 500m out, lost position entering home straight, held from there.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, commenced move 750m out to take the lead 600m out, joined by rivals 150m out and soon flattened out.
Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, raced prominently, briefly checked 500m out, twice bumped 350m out to 200m out, stayed on well but headed by winner close home.
Shifted out, heavily bumped and lost balance at start, three wide in rear, shifted out abruptly 500m out, widest into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, lacked pace to hold position final bend, short of room top of home straight, no impression.
Average to begin, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, hit the front 300M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on outer, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 100M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, hard ridden approaching 350M, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Crowded shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, 2 wide after passing 500M, no clear run early in straight, kept on evenly thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 550M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide behind midfield from 900M, angled out 600M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Showed good speed to lead, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, kicked two lengths clear 200m out, won going away.
Dropped out from wide draw, still in rear top of home straight, made up several places final 250m but never a threat.
Impeded shortly after start, settled in mid-field, checked when short of room 350m out, switched inside against rail for clear run 250m out, unable to quicken.
In rear after bumped out of stalls, still in last place top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Rail position in mid-field, well placed into home straight, challenged and every chance from 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, taken wider on bend, struggled to hold position from 400m out, gave ground final 300m.
Awkward start and lost balance, settled in rear of mid-field, ridden on bend to chase leaders, forced to steady 250m out, ran green.
Dropped out from widest draw, widest into home straight, under pressure to challenge 400m out, ran on strongly to close on winner but always held.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, three wide in rear of mid-field, short-lived effort 300m out, one paced under pressure.
Tracked leaders, switched for clear run 500m out and responded to pressure, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
Ridden along to chase leader early stages, lost position entering home straight, held from there and eased.
Tracked leaders against rail, moved smoothly into contention 500m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out and weakened quickly.
Settled in front of midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, responded nicely when asked (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled worse than midfield, made steady progress under whip.
Settled worse than midfield, angled out at the Turn, never a threat.
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, minor progress made in the Straight.
Settled midfield, raced wide, one pace to the line.
Sat on pace, traveled greenly, lay in throughout, difficult to be fully ridden out (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, held up for clear running until 150M, could not be ridden out.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, no impression made.
Settled behind midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, could not make ground.
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, had every chance (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Sat towards rear, switched out at the Turn, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Waited with towards rear, short of room and held in under 400m out, stayed on well once clear from 300m out, still gaining on winner at line.
Made running, headed 150m out, no extra, hung left.
Tracked leading pair, challenged 300m out and every chance, stuck to task.
Towards rear, headway from 300m out, stayed on.
Pressed leader, ridden 400m out, weakened final 200m.
Towards rear of mid-field, unable to quicken 400m out, stayed on well final 100m, lacked speed to challenge.
Mid-field, wide throughout, weakened 400m out, soon well held.
Held up from wide draw, always in rear.
Wide throughout towards rear, driven 400m out, minimal headway and never dangerous.
Raced in touch with leaders, three wide, one paced under pressure from 400m out and unable to challenge, checked briefly 100m out.
Tracked leading pair, switched to rail and picked up well to lead 150m out, held on.
Held up last, no impression under pressure, never involved.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, unable to quicken over 200m out, switched soon after, weakened.
Mid-field, headway over 200m out, stayed on steadily.
Jumped only fairly, raced at rear, 9 lengths or so back in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, made no impression in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 9 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Shifted in on jumping and bumped, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Lame left front leg next day.)
Began only fairly and made contact, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 500M, same margin back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, headed 200M, retook the lead 50M, kept on well but unable to hold off the challenger late
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move near 550M, wide into straight, finished off strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed very good response early in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Began well, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line
Sat last, stayed on without threatening the winner.
Sat midfield 3 wide, showed some dash top of the Straight and kept on to the line.
Caught 3 wide no cover on pace, never a threat. (Unacceptable performance, must trial)
Sat off pace on the rail, never involved.
Jumped well and led, travelled keenly, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat worse than midfield on the rail, picked off a few weakened rivals. (See Incident Report)
Sat midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, under pressure from the 550M, gave ground soon after. (Bled)
Sat towards the rear, made good progress in the Straight.
Sat behind midfield 3 wide, closed off strongly to score.
Sat midfield on the rail, no luck in running, never serious tested. (Substantial blood)
Sat on pace 2 wide, held up top of the Straight, made minor progress.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked
Sat outside the lead, weakened and faded in the Straight.
Settled in last few on rail, remained similar into straight, improving well when baulked 200M out, renewed effort when clear for a run just over 100M out, finished off the race well.

Settled in forward of midfield in 6th about 3L off the pace on rail, slightly further back rounding home bend but renewed effort upon straightening, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled well back and never a danger.
Settled 3-wide in last few, drifted widest into straight, ran on strongly down the centre of the track, did best work late.
Ridden to lead early stages, ceded advantage for 2nd early on home bend, just behind leaders in 3rd turning into straight, soon weakened.
Amongst leaders, gradually shifted some 2L back to 4th one-out-one-back rounding home bend, kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Began well settling some 3L off the pace mainly in 5th, drifted wider into straight, ran on steadily without threatening.

Broke well from poor draw settling 3-wide without cover in 4th about 1L off the pace, came to join the leader on top of home bend sharing lead into straight, unable to sustain effort and weakened under pressure inside final 300M.
Began fairly, soon recovered to rear of midfield in 8th on rail, switched 2-wide over 700M out, baulked behind runners early in straight and hampered 300M out, dropped out tamely. (Bled)

Broke from a poor draw, soon taken well back and waited with, baulked upon straightening and switched inside for a run, running on well when forced to switch off rail to continue run over 50M out, just got up on line.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in midfield, slightly worse and wider rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure inside final 300M until hampered 50M out.

Broke well from the widest draw, well there and wide before taking up running about 900M out, obtained rails run onto home bend, just under 1L in front on straightening, kept on under pressure but pipped at post.
Settled behind midfield 6Ls away, lacked a strong finishing kick passing 400M. No threat to leaders.
Raced keenly after the start, ended up leading early stages and much more forward than intended, tracked leader going into home turn, fought on same pace early straight before weakening 250M.
Held up towards the rear along the fence, kept to the inside on straightening, closed off mildly to take 3rd close home without troubling first two.
Settled ahead of midfield, steadied when crowded near 900M then raced keenly for some distance, lacked a finishing response in the straight. Never a serious threat to leaders.
From draw 10 taken back to near last, had big task in hand leaving home turn, held up for clear running from 400M-250M before closing off strongly to take 2nd.
Dropped back from draw 13 to race in last, had some work to do top of straight but didn't respond to riding. Never in the picture.
Ended up racing in midfield 4-5Ls off the fast pace, responded only fairly on straightening and failed to trouble leaders. (Jockey questioned regarding his riding in the middle stages.)
Jumped on terms, held up in mid-division 3-wide, brought widest to challenge on straightening but ran on only fairly. (No Vet findings.)
From draw 14 used early to go forward, crossed to the lead just before entering the home turn, caught by rivals 300M, no extra and weakened away.
Checked after the start, ended up near last much further back than usual, gave only limited response on straightening. Never threatened.
Up with early pace, tracked leaders in 3rd entering home turn, moved up to challenge passing 500M, fought for the lead early straight but couldn't sustain run passing 200M.
From draw 1 settled ahead of midfield along the fence, fought hard to keep up with rivals early straight, weakened rapidly 200M. (Bled 2nd time / Compulsory retirement.)
Jumped only fairly, settled down nicely in midfield, switched away from fence 700M, quickened up well early straight to lead inside 300M, kept going strongly for an impressive win.
Up with early pace before settling down 3-wide behind leaders without cover, responded well early straight to go 2nd nearing 200M but couldn't sustain run late stages.
Tracked leaders against rail, switched for clear run 350m out, unable to pick up for pressure and dropped away quickly.
Impeded shortly after start, three wide in mid-field, ridden on bend to chase leaders, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
Dropped out from widest draw, pushed along against rail final bend to chase leaders, made up several places final 200m but never a threat.
Settled in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
Slowly away, rail position in mid-field, short-lived effort top of home straight, no extra final 200m.
Raced in rear after sluggish start, pushed along wide into home straight, briefly hampered 450m out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there.
Bumped out of stalls, waited with towards rear, followed winner through 400m out, ran on strongly to close on winner but always held.
Out wide in rear of mid-field early stages, commenced move 1400m out to join the lead 900m out, weakened final 200m.
Crowded shortly after start, towards rear, outpaced and left behind final bend, ran on well final 200m to made up some late ground.
Showed speed to get across, set strong pace, joined 900m out, maintained narrow advantage until headed by winner 150m out, held from there.
Bumped out of stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, unable to hold position by halfway, eased when detached 250m out.
Tracked leaders, travelled smoothly to chase leaders top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
Across to press leader, dropped to third place 900m out, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, faded final 200m.
Rail position in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, bumped and lost balance 250m out, not fully extended as jockey had concerns with its actions.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 600M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, difficult to obtain clear run until approaching 150M, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Began well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on outer, carried wider near 550M, very wide turning in, made little progress in straight.
Crowded on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest finish.

Bumped start, raced prominently but trapped wide early, taken back to race 2 wide slightly better than midfield after passing 1200M, 3Ls back turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off winner final 50M.
Away well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, found rail near 900M, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened 300M, finished tailed out.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, briefly crowded near 800M, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Bumped start, raced better than midfield but trapped very wide early, slightly taken back to race 3 wide in midfield after passing 1300M, 4Ls back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly.
Settled in rear of mid-field, headway out wide on bend, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, gave ground final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, tight of room 150m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Waited with towards rear in rail position, switched wide on bend for clear run, no impression.
Across to press leader, joined by winner on bend and headed 300m out, flattened out final 100m.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, good headway wide on bend, sustained headway to lead 300m out, strong challenge by runner-up but stayed on well to hold on.
Tracked leaders, short of room top of home straight, did not get best of runs final 200m when trying to improve.
Three wide in mid-field, race keenly throughout, headway on bend to follow winner through 600m out, challenged and every chance from 400m out, one paced under pressure.
Dropped out from wide draw, wide into home straight, stayed on into mid-field but never a threat.
Made running, struggled to hold the lead early in home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m, eased off.
Settled in mid-field, travelled smoothly to chase leaders top of home straight, weakened quickly final 250m.
Rail position in mid-field, did not travel with much fluency on bend, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, ran on strongly final 200m, just failed.
Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place and pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well final 200m to move into third 50m out.
Fast break, tracked leaders against rail, short of room top of home straight, clear run final 200m, unable to quicken.
Rail position in mid-field, blocked off when going for run 400m out to 150m out, checked when trying to improve 100m out, not fully extended.
Bumped start, tracked leaders on the outside, a bit closer after passing 800M, 2nd on turn, took the lead 250M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened 200M, eased final 150M. (Bled.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, tracked leaders, 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back, angled out approaching 400M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well to the line and scored. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off well to take a place.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Shifted in at start and made contact raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, unable to obtain clear run in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved around on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened close home.
Raced in mid-division, commenced move out wide 500m out, bumped 350m out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there.
Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, headway between horses from 250m out, stayed on well.
In rear after crowded at start, still in last place top of home straight, unable to improve position.
Bumped out of stalls, showed good speed to lead, joined by rivals top of home straight, weakened final 100m.
Bumped leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, under pressure on bend and bumped 350m out, stayed on at the one pace.
Dropped out from widest draw, still in rear top of home straight, not best of runs in home straight, not fully extended.
Raced in rear of mid-field, pushed along widest 400m out, no impression.
Ridden along from wide draw to press leader, pushed along on bend to chase leader, flattened out final 100m.
Prominent, well placed into home straight, headway up rail to take a narrow lead 200m out, tired closing stages.
Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, keen early, ridden on bend to chase leaders out wide, short-lived effort 300m out, no extra final 200m.
Waited with towards rear, under pressure 500m out, followed winner through in home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
Bumped leaving stalls, raced in touch with leaders, ridden on bend to chase leaders, unable to secure clear run in home straight.
Flew from the machine from barrier 6 and led, put 3 lengths turning in, kept travelling on straightening up and scored by 2-3/4L impressively.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly to the finish.
Jumped on terms, settled 2 wide in midfield, laying in throughout and difficult to ride, closed off nicely.
Jumped awkwardly, sat towards rear, raced keenly throughout, could not finish the race off (See Incident Report).
Settled on the rail behind the pacemaker, saved ground to turn, kept on one pace when asked.
Settled behind midfield, checked shortly after the start, failed to travel thereafter, could not make ground (See Incident Report).
Jumped nicely, dragged back towards the rear, steadied near 900M, wide into the home straight, stayed on late.
Began well from gate 10, ridden along to cross to be in 2nd spot, held his ground in the final stages, no threat to winner.
Sat rear, made the turn wide, not much ground made in the Straight.
Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, raced keenly, lay in in the Straight, difficult to ride out (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, raced ungenerously, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (Lame right hind on the day after racing).
Sat worse than midfield, pressed on at 400M, one pace to the line.
Waited with towards rear, checked 500m out, no impression under pressure.
Made running, joined from 200m out, weakened final 100m.
Mid-field, pushed along 500m out, lost position early in home straight, held from there.
Tracked pace, effort over 200m out, soon weakened.
Dropped out from wide draw, stayed on but never going pace to challenge, checked briefly 100m out.
Held up, taken wide final bend, one paced and never dangerous.
Mid-division, very wide off final bend, good headway into contention 150m out, stuck to task.
Tracked pace, ridden into home straight, weakened over 200m out.
Checked leaving stalls, shifted across behind runners and waited with, obtained a good run up inside entering home straight, picked up strongly to lead over 100m out, ran on well.
Wide early, chased leader, under pressure 400m out, remained in challenging position until no extra final 100m.
Niggled along early after bumped leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, angled off rail 300m out, picked up well to challenge, stayed on.
Mid-field, switched and headway between horses 200m out, stayed on, lacked pace to challenge.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 650M, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away with them, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 9, raced in midfield on outer, moved closer after passing 700M, 3rd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on very well, won cosily.
Out in line, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide from 600M, a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight to make frame.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 100M
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, closed off fairly.
Sat last, stayed on late.
Sat just behind the leaders, kept on nicely, just held on.
Sat off pace, limited response in the Straight.
Jumped well, ridden along to lead, kept on until weakened final 100M.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, made no impression.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened.
Slow out, sat at the rear, never a threat. (Barrier Manners unacceptable, must trial)
Sat in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight.
Sat midfield, one pace when asked.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, closed off strongly for 2nd.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide, improved into 2 wide rounding the turn, made good ground in the Straight.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, commenced move on the outside 500M out but effort short-lived, kept on well past well-beaten horses inside final 50M.

Gradually settled in midfield 2-wide, became 7th early in back straight when tempo slackened, commenced move home bend swinging wide into straight, quickened well to hit the front over 150M out only to be caught at the 50M.
Travelled keenly in 2nd 2-wide alongside leader, drew level 700M out but given reminders to hold place at the 400M, dropped away quickly inside final 150M.

Taken well back, made rapid progress around the field from 1100M out reaching 3rd one back about 800M out, remained 3-wide without cover bend, kept on under pressure in straight and swamped for a placing inside final 100M.
Shared pace early before obtaining cover in 3rd on rail rounding fist bend, gradually restrained to 2.5L 5th about 900M out, snuck up on rail turning into home straight, weakened inside final 100M.
Travelled in last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, did not find much room behind runners early in straight, made no further impression inside final 150M.

Gradually settled behind midfield 2-wide from draw 12, keen when switched 3-wide no cover 1100M, made swift headway to 3L 6th slackened tempo in back straight, swung wide for home, ran on steadily to go 3rd late.

Crowded at start, gradually settled in 5th on rail some 4L back, closer to lead when tempo slackened in back straight, came under pressure home bend and saved ground turning in, found no extra final 100M.

Began well from a poor draw but soon taken back to midfield 3-wide without cover before first turn, shuffled backward to 6.5L back in 7th in slackened tempo on the first bend, switched wide into straight but unable to quicken. (Lame)
Never far off in 4th, came under pressure from rounding home bend, fought on steadily in straight to reach 3rd briefly about 150M out only to lose the placing near the line.
Settled just behind midfield on rail, carried backward in slackened tempo to last 750m out, baulked for a run and switched 200M out, quickened well to hit the front 50M out.
Gradually crossed from a wide draw to take up running on rail passing the winning post the first time, steadied up the pace at about 1200M out, led until finding no extra inside final 200M.
Settled down mid-division racing wide without cover, bumped near 300M and did not run on when placed under pressure in the straight.
Reserved near last 7Ls off the good pace, held up for clear running 350-250M before finishing off nicely to finish 5th.
Raced behind midfield 5-6Ls back, swung wide into straight then closed off well down the outside. Went 2nd near line.
Bumped at the start, held up in midfield about 5Ls off runaway leader, checked 350M then finished off nicely to take 4th.
Away well from draw 1, reserved in midfield along the inside, switched to center of track 350M, quickened up strongly to lead nearing 200M before keeping on well to score.
Checked on jumping, dropped back to last 10Ls behind runaway leader, plenty to do top of the straight, ran on well down the inside to claim 6th beaten just over 2L.
Bumped at the start, moved up to race behind the runaway leader, battled to hold 2nd early straight, no extra final 150M losing several places in closing stages.
Broke away from leaders passing 800M establishing a big lead entering home turn, run ended mid-straight, caught nearing 200M and was swamped closing stages.
Jumped only fairly, reserved behind midfield in a fast run race, finished off fairly well final 300M but not going the pace of first two closing stages.
From draw 12 caught racing wide no cover behind mid-division, stayed on mildly down the outside on straightening. Couldn't get to leaders.
Led early stages before taking a seat behind the runaway leader, couldn't keep up 400M, soon gave ground and weakened badly to finish last. (Unacceptable Performance.)
From draw 11 obtained a position ahead of midfield, came under pressure nearing 400M, couldn't go on from 300M.
Showed speed to get across, joined 600m out, struggled to hold position top of home straight, faded final 150m.
Steadied after crowded at start, three wide in rear, struggled to hold position on bend, no impression.
Held up last, still in last place and plenty to do top of home straight, ran on strongly final 200m to lead close home, won going away.
Tracked leaders against rail, ridden on bend to chase leaders, travelled smoothly for clear run top of home straight, narrow lead 150m out, no match for front two.
Wide in mid-field, keen 800m out, headway out wide on bend, sustained headway to challenge top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
Chased leader, switched wide for clear run 400m out, challenged and every chance top of home straight, flattened out final 100m.
Three wide in mid-field, commenced move 800m out to join the lead 600m out, pressed on 250m out, weakened final 100m.
Shifted out and bumped at start, rail position in mid-field, challenged up rail from 250m out, lacked pace to reach leaders.
Crowded shortly after start and lost balance, settled in mid-field, pushed along widest on bend, ran on well final 200m but no match for winner.
