In rear after crowded at start, still in rear top of home straight, switched wide 100m out, unable to improve position.
Bumped and lost balance out of stalls, raced in rear, unable to challenge in home straight, short of room close home.
Shifted out and bumped shortly after start, raced in touch with leaders, under pressure to hold position on bend, one paced under pressure.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide after entering the back straight, made contact 900M, hard ridden approaching 550M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, 3 wide on turn, finished off evenly. (Jockey dropped his left rein passing 100M.)
Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 150M, made minor progress thereafter.
Blundered on jumping, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 1100M, 1 out 1 back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped on the hindquarters on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 100M, weakened thereafter.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1300M, made contact near 900M, 4 lengths or so back on turn, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress until not enough room final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2nd after entering the back straight, 1/2L back turning in, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
Out with rest, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 5-1/4L back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right front leg.)
Fast into stride, showed good speed to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened approaching final 100M.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 100M, kept on same pace to the line.
Track leaders, quickened early in home straight, strong run to lead 150m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
Bumped leaving stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, looked green, never going pace to get competitive.
Bumped exiting stalls, showed speed to get across to press leader, ridden top of home straight, weakened final 200m.
Bumped out of stalls, three wide in rear of mid-field, dropped away quickly top of home straight, eased once well held.
Tracked pace out wide, struggled to hold position on bend, lost position entering home straight, held from there.
In rear after awkward start, pushed along widest into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, secured clear run 250m out, stayed on for pressure.
Dropped out from wide draw, running into trouble top of home straight, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, ran on well final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, followed winner through top of home straight, ran on strongly final 200m to close on winner.
Tracked leaders, well placed into home straight, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, gave ground quickly final 150m.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, under pressure early in home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Bounded as stalls opened and lost ground, raced in rear, forced to steady on heels 900m out, tight of room 350m out, never a threat.
Shifted out, made contact and lost ground out of stalls, held up last, switched inside for clear run early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
Made running, responded when challenged from over 300m out, headed by winner 150m out, stuck to task.
Fastest away from the stalls, raced behind pace, unable to pick up under pressure, faded quickly final 150M (See Incident Report).
Worked early to cross the field and led, headed 250M out, weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, outpaced in rear, given a reminder at 550M, stayed at the same pace to the line.
Bumped at the start and tracked pace, passed tired lead pair, kept on evenly to the line.
Raced in mid division along the outside rail, secured clear running final 200M, flew home late.
Angled across to track leaders, stuck on well.
Prominent early, unable to sustain and dropped away swiftly in the final stages.
Began well, let the speed go towards centre of course, responded well when asked.
Away awkwardly and always at rear, detached in the last 300M, never involved.
Broke ok from gate 5, settled towards the rear with cover, switched course 250M out, swept past them and never looked back from there.
In rear after sluggish start, raced keenly 700M out, held when checked near 250M, recovered well and made up steady ground (See Incident Report).
Wide in mid-field, pushed along and lost position over 400m out, no impression.
Waited with in rear after crowded leaving stalls, headway 300m out, hung right, one paced final 150m.
Mid-division, pushed along 400m out, no headway, weakened final 200m.
Tracked leader, driven 350m out and slightly outpaced, stayed on well and improved to hold every chance final 100m.
Dropped in from wide draw after sluggish start, raced in last pair, stayed on into mid-division, never dangerous.
Chased leader, pushed to front 200m out, no extra and headed final 50m.
Crossed from wide draw to make running, headed over 200m out, no extra and lost ground final 100m.
Raced in touch with leaders, unable to quicken over 300m out, stuck to task, lacked speed to challenge.
Pushed along early, settled in rear, picked up strongly 300m out and good headway, sustained run to lead final 50m.
Dropped in from wide draw and raced in last pair, commenced run behind winner 400m out, unable to match that rival but stayed on.
Tracked pace three wide, keen early, quickly lost place turning into home straight, soon well held.
Mid-field, brief effort 400m out, soon flattened out, no threat to leaders.
Towards rear of mid-field, short of room and unable to obtain clear run 400m out to 200m out, no threat after.
Mid-field, ridden along into home straight and unable to hold position, weakened.
Began well, raced towards rear on outer, hampered near 850M, still well back on turn, made no progress in the run home.
Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, steadied near 850M, 4 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back turning in, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, steadied near 850M, wider turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.

Shifted in at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run after turning in, bumped 300M and 200M, found daylight approaching 100M, made no progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, bumped near 300M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 9 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (Lame left front leg next day morning.)

Jumped awkwardly, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Made contact with the right side of its starting gate on jumping, raced at rear, 9 lengths or so back, still 7 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Away with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on outer, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Settled near midfield 2 wide, no luck in the Straight, ran on fairly.
Sat off pace 3 wide, never a threat.
Sat behind the leaders, just one pace when asked.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on late, just missed.
Caught 4 wide no cover midfield, limited response in the Straight.
Sat last, switched out in the Straight, made little impression.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, no clear run early part of the Straight, kept on.
Not the quickest out, settled behind midfield 3 wide, stayed on without threatening top 2. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace 2 wide, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 3 wide, angled out in the Straight, closed off strongly, held off a late challenger.
Sat near the rear on the rail, never seriously tested when held up early, made decent ground late.
Sat midfield on the rail, held up top of the Straight, closed off okay late.
Sent forward to lead, weakened final furlong.
Sat on pace 3 wide, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Travelled keenly one-back on rail in 4th, became 3rd in similar position rounding home bend, kept on until weakened out of contention 100M out.
Improved steadily to one back 4-wide with cover early stages, 3-wide without cover onto home bend, soon weakened after straightening.
Close up early, drifted back to 6th about 1100M out, further back in 8th rounding home bend, did not find much room 200M out, made no further impression in closing stages.
Began well from the one draw and soon took up running, held narrow advantage most of the way until weakened out of contention over 100M out.
Travelled keenly just over 2L back in 6th, drifted slightly further off the pace around home bend, shied away from horse 250M out, kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well to share early lead, taken one-out-one-back to 5th onto home bend, came under pressure upon straightening but steadily faded.
Settled 3-wide in rear of midfield from a poor draw, inconvenienced 350M out, ran on dourly under pressure to gain upper hand close to home.
Soon dropped to last few 3-wide despite ridden early, came under pressure rounding home bend, produced modest late impression past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Began well from the widest draw and amongst leaders 3-wide, gained 2-wide position alongside leader over 900M out, held every chance and hit the front momentarily over 100M out, soon found no extra.

Soon recovered to midfield from moderate start, slightly further back home bend, not much room early in straight, obtained a run between runners 200M out and responded well to hit the front 50M out, caught close home.
Settled in midfield on rail, saved ground turning in for home, faded steadily inside final 150M.
Settled well behind and waited with, commenced move on rail rounding home bend reaching 9th entering straight, sustained progress between runners down the inside to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few one off the rail, drifted backward rounding home bend, shifted wide for a run into straight, finished off the race well inside final 200M.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.
From draw 13 showed customary pace to cross to the lead , became immediately under pressure when challenged by rival nearing 300M before giving ground.
Jumped on terms, dropped back to race at the rear 8-9Ls back, couldn't go on in the straight. Soundly beaten.
Shifted in at the start and was bumped, recovered to race in midfield, kept on evenly passing 400M for a respectable 4th.
Jumped only fairly, dropped back and raced greenly in the rear, brought wide into straight, failed to run on final 400M.
Dropped back to near last 7Ls off the pace, ran on mildly final 400M but was never a serious threat to leaders.
Jumped well, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, battled on one-paced under pressure in the straight. No threat to leaders final 150M.
Settled down behind midfield 4-5Ls back, ran on well in the straight for 3rd but not able to challenge first two late stages.
Away well from draw 1, shared lead early stages before drifting back to sit ahead of midfield, held up 400M-300M before closing off the race steadily .
From wide draw taken back towards the rear, unable to slot in raced wide without cover, 6Ls to make up 400M, ran on powerfully final 250M to claim 2nd, nearest finish.
Jumped only fairly, positioned ahead of midfield on settling, couldn't accelerate enough in the straight, well held by leaders final 200M.
Jumped only fairly, reserved towards the rear on inside, 7Ls to make up 400M, made limited progress towards the line.
Jumped well to be sharing the lead early stages, sat in 3rd from 900M, quickened up well on straightening, led mid-straight then kept on determinedly to score.
Pressed forward from draw 14 and obtained a position outside the lead, placed under pressure 250M, lost 2nd near 100M before weakening rapidly late stages.
Settled down behind midfield 5-6Ls back, little change in position to the straight, didn't respond to riding from 400M.
Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, some headway out wide on bend, sustained headway to challenge 200m out, beaten narrowly.
Waited with towards rear, switched inside for clear run top of home straight, ran on strongly final 300m, just failed.
Across to track leader, travelled smoothly to 400m out and challenged leader, stayed on well but crossed by front three 100m out.
Tracked leader, chased along bend to hold position, dropped away quickly 400m out, eased once well held.
Dropped out from wide draw without cover, taken widest into home straight, short-lived effort 300m out, no extra final 100m.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, ridden along out wide to hold position on bend, lacked pace to challenge.
Rail position in mid-field, travelled smoothly into home straight, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, never dangerous.
Raced in touch with leaders, ridden top of home straight, soon well held and eased when detached 200m out.
Bumped out of stalls, ridden along from stalls to track pace, chased along bend, flattened out final 100m.
Dropped out from widest draw, forced to steady on heels 800m out, bumped 350m out, followed winner through 200m out, stayed on well.
Settled in mid-field, keen throughout, had to wait for run into home straight, bumped 350m out, stayed on well.
Held up last after sluggish start, still in last place top of home straight, switched inside for clear run 350m out, stayed on for pressure.
Settled in mid-field, switched wide for clear run 500m out, under pressure 350m out, strong run final 200m to get up on line.
Showed good speed to lead, ridden top of home straight, joined by rivals 200m out, weakened final 100m.
Began awkwardly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, recovered to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside early, found rail approaching 800M, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Average to begin, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked on run 300M, weakened gradually final 100M.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside early, 2 wide and moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 3Ls back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (Roarer.)
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight, easily scored. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced in midfield on outer, 4 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover from 800M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly from a wide draw, in touch with leaders, wide into straight, kept on well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped only fairly, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back turning in, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Settled in mid-field, switched wide for clear run 600m out, quickened early in home straight, ran on well to lead final 150m, on top from there.
In rear after crowded at start, short of room top of home straight, switched inside for clear run 250m out, stayed on for pressure.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well final 200m to pass plenty of field.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, outpaced and left behind final 200m.
Tracked leaders, well placed into home straight but unable to challenge, gave ground final 200m.
Rail position in mid-field, under pressure 350m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, followed winner through 400m out, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
Showed good speed to lead, travelled smoothly to press on 400m out, headed 200m out, flattened out final 100m.
Shifted in, bumped and lost balance out of stalls, tracked pace out wide, dropped away quickly top of home straight, eased once well held.
Raced in touch with leaders, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
Held up last from widest draw, rail position throughout, chased along on bend, lacked pace to challenge, no impression.
Waited with towards rear, driven 600m out, did not get best of runs in home straight when trying to improve, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Chased leader, struggled to hold position 700m out, gave ground top of home straight, eased when detached 200m out.
Raced in touch with leaders out wide, tended to hang out on bend, pushed ahead over 200m out, weakened final 100m.

Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, positioned 1 out 1 back, there to turn, bumped near 350M, finished off strongly to score.
Slightly slow out, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly, lost 2nd on line.
Blundered on jumping, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, trapped wide in midfield early, raced 2 wide behind midfield in the middle stages, kept on same pace in straight.
Began well from a tricky gate, raced prominently on the outside, 1/4L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 150M, ran on evenly to the line.

Began only fairly, raced towards rear, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from the widest draw, unable to slot in early, slightly taken back after passing 1100M, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, weakened early in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, dropped out and held up last from wide draw, pushed along wide into home straight, some late gains.
Out wide in rear, ridden 700m out, pushed along widest into home straight, hung right but ran on well final 300m to close on winner.
Rail position in mid-field, under pressure to hold position final bend, crowded and checked 200m out, lost all chance.
Bumped out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, keen throughout, driven 500m out, unable to quicken, faded final 200m.
Rail position in mid-field, headway against rail final bend to chase leaders, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Bumped leaving stalls, raced in rear, struggled to hold position final bend, no impression, eased once well held.
Bumped shortly after start, dropped out from widest draw, not best of runs 300m out to 100m out when trying to improve, stayed on.
Bumped out of stalls, held up, started to lose position 700m out, eased when detached early in home straight.
Crowded at start, settled in mid-field, bumped 400m out, briefly tight for room early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
Crowded at start, tracked pace out wide, under pressure 550m out to chase leaders, headway early in home straight, weakened final 100m.
Shifted in and bumped at start, ridden along from stalls to lead, headed by winner top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
Shifted in and bumped at start, headway first bend to press leader, dropped away quickly in home straight.
Tracked leaders, headway final bend to chase leaders, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
Crowded at start, out wide in rear of mid-field, some headway out wide final bend, bumped 400m out, no extra final 200m.
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, responded fairly well when asked.
Ridden hard to lead, traveled nicely, led all the way to score.
Sat handy, raced keenly in the early stages, no clear run in the Straight until 150M, not fully tested.
Sat rear, switched out entering the Straight, made some ground from behind.
Jumped only fairly and sat towards the rear, overracing, made minor progress in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly, chased the leader, kept on evenly to the line.
Settled one off the rail about 3 lengths off the leader, kept on same pace to the line, never dangerous.
Followed leader's back 2 lengths off, not fully tested in the final stages (See Incident Report)
Trapped wide with no cover throughout from gate 11, commencing forward move from 700M, had tough run and unable to finish off (See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, traveled smoothly, made steady progress.
A fraction slow away, sat a tad worse than midfield hugging the rail, failed to muster speed, quickly beaten.
Began well enough and always in touch with leaders in 3rd spot, failed to quicken in the last furlong (See Incident Report).
Tracked leading pair, driven 300m out, soon one paced.
Raced in touch with leaders, under pressure and outpaced briefly over 300m out, stayed on to go second 100m out, no threat to winner.
Raced on quarters of leader, unable to stay with that rival early in home straight, weakened and lost three places final 150m.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along into home straight and soon struggling, lost touch final 200m.
Held up last and plenty to do, pushed along 500m out, stuck to inside rail and headway home straight, stayed on.
Dictated pace, quickened early in home straight, over two lengths clear 200m out and in command, eased closing stages.
Jumped only fairly, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 750M, 1-1/4L back turning in, took the lead near 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden after passing 250M, showed very good response, led close home.
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M. (Bled.)
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L, easy lead to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 100M.
Sat towards the rear, made minor progress.
Sent forward to lead, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, switched out rounding the Home Turn, closed off okay. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, made little impression
Sat on pace 2 wide, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind the leaders, unable to quickened in the Straight, kept on fairly.
Sat midfield on the rail, made some late ground.
Sat at the rear, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Sat outside the leader, kept on but no threat to winner.
Raced towards the rear, never a threat.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide early, began to improve from the 900M, closed off strongly, won cozily.
Sat last, made no ground.
Sat midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Caught 3 wide just off midfield, stayed on.
Prominent early from a poor draw gradually settling in midfield, switched wide into straight, made no further impression.
Detached from the main body of the field in back straight, made up good ground past well-beaten horses in the run to the line.
Broke well settling one back in 3rd on rail, came to challenge from 2nd into straight but unable to draw level throughout.
Pressed forward from a poor draw travelling 3-wide without cover in back straight, weakened out of contention on home bend.
Pressed forward from a poor draw, chased leader 2-wide, came under pressure rounding home bend but faded out of contention upon straightening.
Soon taken back to forward of midfield in 6th on rail, gained closer to 5th past 1000M, switched wide for a run into straight but made no further impression.
Settled in rear on rail, snuck closer turning in for home, kept on same pace without further progress in straight. (Lame)

Pressed forward from the widest draw, wide rounding first bend, settled 3-wide without cover in 4th within 2L of pace in back straight, remained similar around home bend, gradually weakened out of contention upon straightening.
Soon taken back to last few from a poor draw travelling 3-wide without cover in back straight, shifted wider rounding home bend and widest into straight, one-paced under pressure.
Made all on rail from the one draw setting a sound pace, hung on well under pressure.
Settled toward rear, baulked behind runners despite shifted wide into straight, soon weakened.
Settled well back from a poor draw and waited with, baulked approaching home straight but saved ground turning in for home, ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear on the inside, angled out of a run on straightening, ran on quite well under pressure without threatening.
Jumped only fairly, given a waiting ride at the rear 8Ls off the good pace, couldn't go on final 400M. Never in the picture.
Jumped awkwardly, pushed on to the lead setting good pace, headed 250M, no extra closing stages. (Jockey - did not run out the race distance of 1200M.)
Raced towards the rear, struggled to keep up before home turn, had nothing to offer on straightening and failed to run on.
Settled down in midfield 4Ls off the good pace, worked home evenly from 400M to go 3rd 150M but wasn't good enough to challenge first two.
From draw 1 went forward, tracked leader entering home turn, under the pump 500M before fading out mid-straight. (Jockey and Trainer - did not appreciate racing on the All Weather surface.)
Began well, restrained to race in midfield 4-5Ls back, worked home one paced final 300M to grab 4th. No threat to first two.
Reserved behind midfield along the inside, chased steadily from 400M without threatening first two but wasn't far off 3rd and 4th. Encouraging debut.
Jumped only fairly, dropped back to race at the rear, detached from the field 500M and was already beaten turning home.
Chased leader 2-wide, moved up to take the lead 250M, joined by eventual winner from 200M, rallied but found the winner a touch too strong at the end. Clear from remainders.
From draw 12 obtained a midfield position along the 3-path, raced without cover throughout, kept on one paced towards the line.
From draw 11 obtained a position behind midfield, 6Ls off leader home turn, responded fairly when brought wide to challenge on straightening. Never a serious threat.

Settled in 4th always in touch with leaders, travelled best of all at 400M, quickened to grab narrow lead inside 200M, stuck to task well late and was always holding off the persistent 2nd under confident riding.
Across to chase leaders, bumped 400m out and taken wider, responded to pressure from 300m out, no extra closing stages.
Pressed leader, challenged leader top of home straight, dropped away quickly 300m out.
Awkward start and lost ground, held up last, driven along and outpaced middle stages, no impression.
Rail position in mid-field, short of room final bend when trying to improve, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, ran on well to close on winner.
Settled in mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, headway early in home straight, no further impression on front two late on.
Tracked leaders, tried to challenge up rail from 450m up, unable to pick up for pressure in home straight.
Ridden along from stalls to track leaders, chased leaders 450m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Waited with towards rear, still in rear top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, never dangerous.
Pressed in front, ridden top of home straight, headed by winner 300m out, weakened final 100m.
Stumbled leaving stalls and lost balance, rail position in mid-field, switched for clear run 400m out and bumped, strong run to lead 300m out, on top from there.
Settled in mid-field, switched wide for clear run 600m out, gave ground final 300m, eased once well held.
Slightly impeded shortly after start, in rear, short of room early in home straight, checked 250m out, lost all chance.
Raced in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on, never a threat.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, switched wide but short of room final bend when trying to improve, clear run 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Began well from gate 14, raced at rear on the stands' rail, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 500M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 100M.
Made contact at start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader, hard ridden 400M but only showed limited response, hampered near 250M, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the middle track, passed some tired runners final 350M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden from 400M but showed no response, weakened final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced slightly better than midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off evenly.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear, hard ridden after passing 250M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader in the middle of the track, hard ridden after passing 300M but showed no response, weakened final 200M. (Roarer.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear, 3 to 4 lengths back, moved closer approaching 500M, kept on well until no extra final 100M.
Began smartly, showed good speed to take the lead, headed 500M, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in midfield, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped awkwardly, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced prominently, took the lead 250M, kept on well, just able to hold off the challenger.
Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the stands' side, hard ridden from 400M but showed no response, eased final 150M.
Fast break, across from wide draw to lead, ridden when challenged by rivals 350m out, pressed by runner-up to line and just prevailed.
Three wide in mid-field, headway out wide on bend, sustained headway to challenge 350m out, stayed on well but always held.
Heavily bumped leaving stalls, keen under restraint, three wide in mid-field, short-lived challenge 400m out, no extra final 150m.
Bumped out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, short of room top of home straight, weakened quickly final 250m.
Raced wide towards rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge, lost touch final 200m.
Tracked leaders against rail, followed winner into home straight, lacked pace to hold position from top of home straight.
Held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, passed several rivals but never dangerous.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, tended to hang right and dropped away quickly in home straight, soon well held.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, bumped 1050m out, settled in mid-field, responded to pressure from 300m out, ran on well and lost out only narrowly.
Dropped out from widest draw, under pressure 550m out, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
Shifted out and heavily bumped leaving stalls, bumped 1050m out, in rear, struggled to hold position from 800m out, dropped to last place turning into home straight, no impression.
Tracked pace, struggled to hold position top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
Slowly away, rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, stuck to task.
In rear after sluggish start, switched wide for clear run 500m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Sat midfield, minor progress under whip.
Chased the leader one-off, weakened quickly near the 250M (See Incident Report).
Jumped well, sat in front of midfield, lay in near the 200M, (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, raced rear, could not make up ground.
Sat worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, ran on evenly.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, made steady progress.
Sat handy, raced wide throughout, gave ground in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled behind midfield, one pace to the line.
Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, hampered near the 200M, had every chance (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, improved passing 600M, stayed on fairly.
Tracked pace, improved to challenge 150m out, every chance, just denied.
In rear, little impression until late headway into mid-field, never dangerous.
Mid-field, very wide throughout, unable to pick up from 300m out, no impression.
Tracked leader, maintained position behind pace until no extra final 100m and lost third.
Started well, made running, challenged final 150m, responded to pressure and just held on.
Across from widest draw to press leader, under pressure 300m out, weakened.
Mid-field, short of room when trying to improve between horses from 300m out, unable to challenge.
In rear, pushed along from top of home straight, some late headway, lacked pace to get competitive.
Held up, limited impression when tight for room against rail final 150m, unable to be fully ridden out.
Slowly away, recovered to race in rear of mid-field, pushed along over 300m out, unable to quicken and no real impression.
Dropped in from wide draw, pushed along and no impression from 300m out, never out of rear.
Raced in touch with leaders, unable to quicken 300m out, no extra and lost ground final 150m.
Towards rear of mid-field, pushed along into home straight, stayed on, lacked pace to reach leaders.
Raced in touch with leaders, didn't settle, had to wait for run over 300m out, switched 200m out, stayed on.
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, failed to make any progress thereafter.

Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, sent forward to take the early lead, headed approaching 1000M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, angled out 450M, same margin back turning in, no clear run until approaching final 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide behind midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, wider from 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
Began smartly, raced prominently, took the lead approaching 1000M, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back, checked near 600M, still last turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 2 wide on very wide into straight, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped on terms, sat just behind the leaders, responded well when asked, kicked clear at the 200M, won easing down.
Sat midfield on the rail, closed off nicely, just no threat to winner.
Sat towards the rear, made good ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled last on the rail, held up in the Straight, stayed on okay once in the clear.
Sat midfield 2 wide, made little impression.
Ridden along early to lead, weakened in the Straight.
Caught 3 wide on pace, weakened final 75M.
Settled just over 3L off the pace in 4th, soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Broke well from the widest draw but soon taken back to last few, baulked behind runners after straightening and checked 300M out, kept on steadily without threatening.

Began well from a wide draw travelling wide without cover in midfield, in similar position rounding home bend improving to 2L 4th and one of the widest into straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
4-wide in midfield early stages, shifted back to last few 3-wide onto first bend, dropped further back to last and one of the widest into straight, kept on past well-beaten horses.
Broke well travelling wide without cover just better than midfield, dropped out quickly inside final 450M.
Chased leaders on rail, became 2nd 400M out, unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Crowded at start and soon taken across at the back for rails run, travelled keenly on heels from the 600M, obtained a clear run switching onto inside 300M out, finished off the race well.
Mainly in midfield, tight between runners early in straight and checked 280M out, steadied again 180M out, made no further impression in closing stages.
Settled well back from a poor draw and waited with, switched wide for a run into home straight, ran on strongly inside final 350M to hit the front 100M out.
Shared early pace from a wide draw, drifted one back to 2nd 2-wide rounding home bend, folded up quickly inside final 400M. (Lame)
Travelled in midfield 3-wide with cover, slightly worse around home bend and given reminders entering straight, kept on under pressure without threatening.
Pressed forward to share early pace, obtained 1L advantage 1000M out, led until caught over 100M out.
Jumped moderately, recovered swiftly on rail to just over 4L back in 6th 900M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
Moderate start, recovering in midfield when checked and lost position 1100M out, towards rear on rail rounding home bend but saved ground into straight, faded under pressure.
Caught wide no cover early stages before pushing on to race outside leader, cruised to the lead 300M then kicked clear final 150M for a scintillating win.
Jumped awkwardly, chased leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, couldn't go with first two passing 300M, battled on late stages to hold 3rd.
Crossed to the lead before home turn, led at good pace, couldn't hold off the mighty Romantic Warrior 300M but fought on well to finish a clear 2nd.
Close enough to leaders down the back straight but got shuffled back over the home turn, ran home one paced final 400M. Never dangerous.

Led early stages before settling down in a trailing position behind leader, came under pressure making the home turn then weakened away badly to finish tailed out. (Trainer could offer no explanation for the performance.)
In midfield, raced keenly early and middle stages, drifted back to the rear after being checked 800M, ran home fairly final 400M. No impression on leaders.
Bumped after the start, raced towards the rear 3-4Ls back, failed to pick up on straightening and was never a threat.
Chased leader early, drifted back after being steadied 800M, had difficulty obtaining clear running 350-250M before running on mildly to the line to share 4th spot.
From wide draw taken back to last after the start, raced wide no cover from 800M, ran on mildly in the straight to share 4th spot posed little threat to first two.
Tracked pace against rail, had to wait for run turning into home straight, switched inside for clear run 300m out, strong run final 200m to get up on line.
Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Head in air shortly after start, towards rear, commenced move out wide 700m out, good progress to lead 200m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
Crowded at start, settled in rear of mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, never dangerous.
Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, made running, ridden top of home straight, headed 200m out, weakened final 100m.
Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, switched for clear run 600m out, pressed on 350m out, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
In rear after sluggish start, rail position throughout, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, no impression.
Raced wide, improved to chase leader 900m out, struggled to hold position top of home straight, dropped away quickly 300m out.
Held up last, keen middle stages, still in last place top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on, never a threat.
Settled in mid-field, did not travel with much fluency on bend, unable to secure clear run until 250m out, stayed on for pressure.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, taken wider on bend, unable to hold position early in home straight, flattened out final stages.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made very good progress in straight, nearest finish.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, shared lead from 650M, hard ridden approaching 250M, finished off evenly.
Jumped only fairly, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, steadied off heels near 750M, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead with rival from 650M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 100M, finished 2nd.
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, hard ridden after passing 300M, showed very good response, took the lead 100M, kept on very well to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, lay out making the turns in the middle stages, peaked near 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, taken back to race at rear, 7 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield, 2 wide, a bit closer in the middle stages, angled out 550M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Rail position in mid-field, headway up rail early part of home straight, angled out to make run 250m out, stayed on steadily.
Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, raced in rear, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, ran on well final 200m to lead close home.
Shifted in and bumped heavily out of stalls, mid division, switched wide for clear run on bend, left behind home straight.
Three wide in mid-field, some headway on bend, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, never a threat.
Tracked leaders against rail, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, lost touch final 200m.
Tracked pace out wide, improved to chase leader 800m out, sustained headway to lead top of home straight, headed 100m out, stuck to task.
Heavily bumped and lost balance out of stalls, rail position in rear of mid-field, short of room top of home straight, followed winner through 200m out, stayed on well.
Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, did not get best of runs in home straight when trying to improve, eye-catching finish.
Bumped leaving stalls, raced in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, never a factor.
Raced wide, improved to lead 1200m out, soon headed by rival top of home straight, flattened out final 100m.
Made running, headed 1200m out, remained prominent, struggled to hold position top of home straight, dropped away quickly 300m out.
Tracked leaders, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, narrow lead 100m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to quicken.
Settled in mid-field, clear run 350m out, briefly tight for room 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take a place.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 1-1/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Made contact shortly after start, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 150M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 4 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, tracked leaders on the inside, easy run to turn, took the lead 150M, kept on well and scored.
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on outer, bumped near 450M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out and made contact near 450M, no clear run until approaching final 100M, made no progress thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.

Settled midfield, not much impression made.
Settled midfield, held up rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, made steady progress when asked.
Settled towards rear, improved inside 800M, could not be ridden out when positioned close to heels (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, responded reasonably well under whip, had every chance.
Chased the leader, traveled strongly, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off strongly.
Sat rear, traveled fairly, ran on evenly.
Towards rear of mid-field, stayed on amongst horses final 150m.
Made running, headed 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Waited with in rear, keen early, some headway 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Wide early, taken forward and raced prominently, ridden to lead 200m out, stayed on well to hold on.
Mid-field, pushed along 400m out, wide into home straight, no extra final 100m.
Tracked leaders, pushed along into home straight, switched inside over 200m out, tight for room final 100m, unable to be ridden out fully.
Mid-field, quickened to challenge 150m out, no extra and lost second final 50m.
Towards rear, widest final bend, stayed on, unable to reach leaders.
Tracked pace, three wide, weakened final 200m.
Dropped in from widest draw and raced in last place, headway amongst horses from 200m out, stayed on well, still gaining on winner at line.
Held up, struggling entering home straight, left behind.
Tracked pace, angled off rail to challenge over 200m out, stuck to task under pressure.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, bumped near 700M, 7 lengths back turning in, showed limited response in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 500M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run 350M, weakened early in straight, eased inside final furlong.
Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Bumped start, positioned 7 lengths behind the leader on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced at rear on the inside, bumped near 700M, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually close home.

Began only fairly from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, made contact near 600M, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, finished off well to make frame without threatening the first few.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped near 600M, angled out 400M, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 400M, finished off evenly.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back, peaked on run 400M, weakened thereafter. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Taken back to last from gate 10, ridden quietly, made up some ground over the final stages.
Quickest away from the stalls and straight to the lead, setting fast sectionals, stuck to the task until the last 75m, passed by some strong-finishing rivals thereafter.
Sat midfield the rail with a charmed run, held position but no pace to challenge the top three.
Away well from the widest draw, covered ground throughout, swung widest for home, unable to sustain run final stages.
Average to begin, urged along early stages to stay in touch with the field 4 back the fence, dashed home when winner was off and gone.
Began awkwardly, momentarily racing wide without cover before ridden along to be outside the leader, battled on well but just couldn't hold off the winner over final 50m (See Incident Report).
Away swiftly, tracked speed one off the rail, loomed up 150m out and quickened nicely to score, despite laying in over the final stages.
Bounced away nicely, 2 lengths or so on the leader's back, checked 350m out, struggled to pick up momentum and soon after dropped away (See Incident Report).
Settled towards the rear, slightly drifted back rounding the home turn, made good late progress final stages.
Jumped ok and sat midfield one off, failed to find extra gear to close off his first race in Hong Kong.
Broke awkwardly and settled 2nd last after crowded at the start, accelerated only until the last 50m, beaten less than 3L.

Pressed forward after moderate start from the widest draw, settled in 9th 3-wide with cover, became 10th past 700M, obtained clear passage down the centre of track over 200M out, finished off strongly to snatch victory final strides.

Pressed forward from a poor draw reaching within 1L of pace 3-wide in 4th briefly early in back straight, drifted 2L back to joint 4th in middle stages, fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
Never a factor though producing some late impression in home straight.
Settled towards rear, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran on in straight, never nearer.
Travelled 3-wide in midfield, commenced move entering home straight, unable to quicken under pressure and made no further impression inside final 200M.
Soon improved to just better than midfield in 5th then 4th within 3L of pace, tight between runners upon straightening, made no further impression inside final 200M.
Pressed forward from a poor draw settling some 1L back in 2nd in back straight, came to challenge approaching home turn and soon drew level after straightening, unable to sustain effort final stages.
Settled in last few, snuck closer though tight between runners early in home straight, never nearer.
Broke well gradually settling in midfield on rail, just over 3L back in 6th rounding home bend, saved ground on rail turning in, fought on steadily without quickening.
Crowded shortly after start settling just behind midfield in 8th, baulked for a run early in home straight, produced good late impression inside final 100M.
Broke well settling just over 1L off the pace in 3rd on rail, gained closer on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon took up running obtaining rails run early in back straight, led the field until joined over 250m out, fought on well under pressure but found fast-finishing winner too strong.
From wide draw sent forward to chase leader, quickened up nicely early straight to take the lead near 200M, continued on well late stages and held on from the fast finishing runner-up.

Began well from draw 1, restrained to a midfield spot, raced keenly in the middle stages, kept on well enough in the straight but not going the pace of first two final 200M.
Jumped on terms, eased back to race towards the rear, closed off steadily final 300M without posing threat to first two.
From wide draw obtained a midfield position, 3Ls off the pace 400M, worked home evenly in the run home for 4th.
Took up running as expected, led uncontested to the straight, headed near 200M, faded towards the line.

Settled in mid-field, keen early stages, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, eased when detached 100m out.
Raced in rear, short of room early in home straight, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Crowded at start, held up last, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
Recovered from sluggish start to settle in rear of mid-field, driven final bend, unable to quicken.
Showed speed to get across, kicked top of home straight, headed by winner 150m out, stayed on steadily.
Raced in rear, pushed along final bend to chase main body of runners, lacked pace to challenge.
Tracked leaders against rail, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, ran on strongly to lead 150m out, on top from there.
Rail position in mid-field, challenged and every chance early in home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.

Raced in touch with leaders, chased along final bend, ran on well final 200m to close on winner but always held.
Dropped out from wide draw, widest throughout, some headway final bend, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.

Began well from gate 12, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed approaching 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching 150M, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead approaching 250M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.

Dropped out from wide draw, some headway up rail in home straight, stayed on but never going pace to challenge.

Waited with in rear, under pressure 600m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, outpaced and left behind final 300m.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, bumped near 300M, finished off evenly.

Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Slow to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching final 200M, made minor progress thereafter.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.

Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight and scored.
