Taken back to race 3 wide with cover towards rear, wider from 400M, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 150M.
Out with rest, settled 2 wide near the pace, showed good response early in the straight, not fully ridden out inside 100m due to rider's concern of the horse's action (See Incident Report).
Jumped with the field and raced 3 back the fence, pumped along at 400m, momentarily difficult to establish a run in the straight, close off okay without threatening the top four.
Began smartly from gate 7, charges forward to take up the lead, still kicked strongly in the straight despite setting fast sectionals, only overhauled in the last few strides, brave in defeat.
Was slow into stride and settled at the back division, forced slightly wider turning for home, made some minor progress in the end.
Moderately away, happy to let the speed go in midfield one off, 5Ls or so off the leader turning for home, let down sharply centre of track but just unable to pip the winner bob of the heads.
Straight into the box-seat trail from a low draw, tracking leader 2Ls back, one-paced when asked over the final stages.
Settled towards the rear on the rail after a sluggish start, travelled okay throughout, failed to show his usual turn of foot with good pace up front.
Stepped away cleanly from barrier 9, raced prominently to be 3/4L outside the leader, stuck to the task and dug deep to fend off a late challenger.
Ran out of room shortly after the start and taken back to last, hugged the rail throughout, found nothing in the straight.
Settled well back on the fence, moved off the rail in the middle stages, closed off fairly over the final stages.
Was average to begin and angled across to the rear, given a patient ride 10Ls off the good speed, widest into the straight with stacks of ground to make up, made strong late impression.
Pressed forward from an awkward draw, unable to slot in 3 wide facing the breeze the whole trip, under pressure inside 400m, gave ground quickly and tired out.
Began awkwardly settling in forward of midfield 3-wide in 6th within 3L of pace, commenced move inside the 400M, quickened well inside final 150M just fail to get up on line.
Jumped best from a poor draw to lead early stages, gradually taken back to one back in 3rd or 4th on rail, chased leaders into straight, held place chance until swamped inside final 50M.
Soon dropped to last few, ran on steadily past well-beaten horses inside final 150M.
Jumped awkwardly settling in rear of midfield in 8th or 7th fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Broke well from a poor draw holding 2nd 2-wide, quickened to hit the front entering home straight only to overhauled 200M out.
Broke well but soon dropped to joint 4th just over 2L back, became 5th in similar position about 800M out, ran on under pressure to hit the front just inside the 200M, hung on well to the line.
Pressed forward after moderate start from the widest draw improving 4-wide down back straight to reach 1L 3rd 3-wide 800M out, remained similar into home straight but folded up quickly.
Settled in last few on rail after moderate start, found nothing under pressure in home straight.
Settled in last few and waited with, commenced move approaching home straight 400M out, ran on well under pressure down the centre of the track, did best work late.
Took up running just before the 1000M bend, obtained rails run over 800M out, led until headed after straightening, folded up quickly.
Held up in rear of midfield on rail from the one draw niggling along, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily in straight without threatening, raced greenly throughout.
Held up in mid-pack along the inside, lay in for most part of the straight, gave limited response only.
Restrained in mid-division along the 2-path, kept on same pace final 300M. Never able to challenge leaders.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, ran home one paced and was no threat to leaders from mid-straight.
From wide draw taken back to last, had 7-8Ls to make up on leader 400M, couldn't improve position.
Jumped on terms, settled down 3-wide in midfield 3Ls back, failed to run on in the home straight. (Jockey could offer no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
Pushed on to press leader on outside, took over the lead inside 300M, continued on well but couldn't hold off winner final stages.
Chased leaders on the inside, fought on well enough passing 350M but was always held by first two final 200M.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, given a waiting ride towards the rear, kept to the inside on straightening but couldn't quicken enough to challenge leaders.
Positioned behind midfield, waited with till 350M before running on well to take 4th.
Away quickly, stayed close to the leading pair, dashed well on straightening and took over nearing 100M before racing away to score on his first start for new trainer.
Slow to begin, reserved near last 6Ls off the pace, had some work to do 400M, closed off fastest for 5th.
Soon in front from draw 1, pressed by rival in the lead throughout, headed inside 300M, weakened over final 200M. (Jockey could offer no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
Tracked leader, under pressure to challenge leader top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
Waited with towards rear, raced wide throughout without cover, pushed along 500m out, ran on strongly final 200m.
Tracked leaders against rail, good headway final bend, challenged and every chance from 300m out, lost out only narrowly.
Waited with in rear, keen middle stages, checked 700m out, outpaced final bend, left behind home straight.
Awkward start, raced in touch with leaders, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
Showed good speed to lead, under pressure 250m out, stayed on well, tired closing stages and just held on.
Settled in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, hung out and bumped 150m out, never a threat.
Dropped out from wide draw, headway up rail early stages, checked 700m out, never going pace to get competitive.
Disputed led, pulled up 900m out, found lame in its right hind leg.
Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, some headway on bend, clear run 150m out, ran on strongly.
Rail position in mid-field, keen middle stages, chased along final bend, never dangerous.
Raced in rear, struggled to hold position final bend, pushed along widest into home straight, lost touch final 200m.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide towards rear, 2 wide on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 200M, made some progress thereafter until blocked final 50M.
Jumped awkwardly and unbalanced, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 3-1/2L back, same margin back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail approaching 700M, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off well to take a place.
Moderately away, showed no early speed, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Fast into stride, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, shared lead turning in, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Made contact with the left side of its starting gate on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 2 wide from 700M, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off strongly to score.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, last turning in, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 150M, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line.
Away well, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the outside, there to turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Began smartly from the widest draw, tracked leaders, 3 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider on turn, hard ridden from 300M, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced in touch with leaders against rail, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, sticking to task.
Rail position in mid-field, race keenly throughout, angled off rail 400m out, short of room final 200m, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Dropped out from widest draw, still in last pair top of home straight, no impression.
Tracked leaders, short of room 400m out to 100m out when trying to improve, lacked pace to challenge.
Ridden along from stalls to lead, kicked turning into home straight, headed 300m out, faded final 100m.
Showed good speed to press leader, quickened early in home straight to lead 300m out, headed by winner 150m out, stuck to task.
Raced in rear, had to wait for run top of home straight, clear run 300m out, ran on well final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, unable to improve position.
Dropped out from wide draw, still in last pair top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Waited with towards rear, raced wide throughout without cover, pushed along widest into home straight, never a threat.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there, won cosily.
Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position early in home straight, gave ground final 300m.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
Held up, followed winner through 400m out, ran on well final 300m but no threat to winner.
Settled handy, failed to respond when asked (Substantial blood in trachea, See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, traveled smoothly, switched out rounding the Turn, responded nicely when asked.
Ridden along to lead, weakened on straightening, gave ground.
Settled behind midfield, limited when asked (Bled, Must BT).
Settled worse than midfield, took inside run in the Home Straight, lay out over the final 100M.
Sat worse than midfield, improved passing the 700M, ran on evenly.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, gave ground passing the 150M.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled okay, lay out over the final 100M.
Settled handy, pressed on near the 700M, failed to respond in the Straight.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, one pace to the finish.
Sat midfield, traveled nicely, made good ground when asked, just missed.
Sat towards rear, directed out in the Straight, made steady ground late.
Raced rear, never traveled, eased down entering the Straight (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, traveled fairly, minor progress made.
Commenced well from wide draw and across to lead, hung left under pressure home straight, headed 200m out, stuck to task but winner too strong.
Tracked pace, ridden 400m out, weakened final 200m.
Tracked leading pair, keen, unable to stay with those rivals and no extra final 250m.
Rear of mid-field, one paced under pressure home straight, no threat to leaders.
Held up, last and wide into home straight, stayed on final 200m, never dangerous.
Mid-field, keen mid-race, forward move 300m out, stayed on, unable to reach leaders.
Mid-field, pushed along into home straight, weakened 300m out.
Held up from wide draw, ridden 400m out, no impression.
Waited with in rear, pushed along 400m out, some headway final 200m, never dangerous.
Raced in touch with leaders, effort 350m out, weakened 150m out, eased final 100m.
Tracked pace three wide, keen, brief effort early in home straight, soon weakened.
Soon prominent, pushed into lead 200m out, asserted and in control final 100m, won readily.
Held up from wide draw, no impression under pressure home straight.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, stayed on final 200m but lacked pace to trouble front two.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, angled out after passing 600M, showed good response early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, angled out 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress without threatening the first few.
Began only fairly from the widest draw, raced in midfield but trapped wide, no cover throughout, dropped towards rear approaching 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, difficult to settle in the middle stages, angled out 600M, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Shifted out shortly after start and bumped, raced prominently on the outside, peaked 500M, weakened gradually final 300M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Caught 3 wide no cover near midfield, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, angled out rounding the Home Turn, closed off strongly, battled gamely and won.
Last to jump, sat midfield on the rail, slightly held up early part of the Straight, ran on strongly, always held.
Settled outside the leader, kept on fairly. (See Incident Report)
Settled towards the rear 3 wide, made no impression.
Settled midfield 2 wide, showed some dash top of the Straight, peaked at the 200M, one pace to the line.
Sat just behind the leaders, nothing extra.
Showed good early speed to lead, gave ground in the Straight. (Substantial blood)
Sat at the rear, held up early part of the Straight, made some late ground. (See Incident Report)
Taken back from the outside barrier, sat at the rear, stayed on.
Driven forward from a poor draw holding prominent positions well off the rail, came to join race leader briefly onto first turn, but unable to quicken to challenge from 1L joint 2nd into straight.
Travelled 3-wide with cover in midfield, lost cover in similar position rounding home bend, awkward when shifted very wide into straight, soon eased.
Moderate start, gradually recovered to midfield in 8th or 7th on rail, improved to 6th some 4L back on home bend, fought on under pressure to reach 2nd 100M out but without threatening the winner.
Began fairly travelling keenly within 2L of pace in 4th on rail, gained 3rd rounding home bend and saved ground on rail into straight, faded steadily inside final 200M.
Settled towards rear in 10th or 9th, made no impression in home straight.

Soon taken across from a poor draw for rails run at the back, commenced move coming onto home bend improving under pressure to within 4L of pace in 7th briefly early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
With leaders, ceded position to travel one-out-one-back in 4th onto home bend, kept on in straight until faded inside final 200M.
Amongst leaders briefly from a wide draw and soon taken back to wide in last few, carried wider into home straight, made no further impression.
Soon led, made all setting a sound pace, ridden clear over 200M out.
Broke well before settling in 6th in midfield, only produced moderate progress under pressure inside final 200M.

Well there very wide early from a poor draw, restrained to rear remaining without cover onto first turn, obtained cover 700M out but could find nothing in home straight. Jockey reported the horse hung out early and middle stages.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, baulked for a run after straightening until 300M out, only passed well-beaten runners.
Taken back from the widest draw travelling keenly on heels in early stages, 3-wide in rear rounding home bend swinging widest into straight, made no further impression.

Prominent 3-wide without cover in early stages, obtained cover in 2L 5th over 1000M out, slightly further off the speed rounding home bend and 6th into straight, fought on under pressure inside final 200M without threatening.
Jumped on terms, chased leader in 2nd, quickened up well under top weight to lead mid-straight, just couldn't hold off winner final 100M.
Settled towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, finished off very well final 400M to go 5th near line.
From a wide barrier given a conservative ride in the early stages, had plenty to do top of the straight but couldn't go on.
Jumped awkwardly, dropped back from wide draw to race near last, couldn't improve in the straight and was never in the picture.
Settled towards the rear 7Ls off leader, failed to run on in the home straight.
From draw 1 moved up to chase leaders, steadied 350M then closed off nicely to hit lead inside 100M, ran away late to score.
Quickly away, soon in front and led uncontested to the straight, headed mid-straight then faded to finish 4th.
Bumped on jumping, raced wide without cover in midfield, didn't find much when ridden along from 400M. Never a threat to leaders.
From wide draw taken across to race in the 3rd spot, found less than expected when placed under pressure 400M, never picked up pace to challenge and just keeping on same speed final 200M.
Settled behind midfield 3-wide, came wide into straight before closing off the race mildly.
Commenced well and held a more forward position than its previous starts, 6th at 400M, closed off only fairly. (Mucus / Roarer which had previously been reported.)
Reserved in a position behind midfield, driven 500M but couldn't quicken enough to pose any threat to the leaders.

Dropped back to the rear and stayed 3-wide 8Ls off leader, ran past beaten horses in the straight and not getting to leaders. (Jockey satisfied with the finishing effort, particularly as it was dropping back in distance.)
Jumped only fairly, recovered to race in midfield along the fence, 4Ls behind leader 400M, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, ran on well to get up on line.
Rail position in mid-field, under pressure 600m out, stayed on for pressure, heavily bumped 100m out and lost balance, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Dropped out from widest draw, pushed along widest into home straight, tended to hang right in home straight, ran on strongly.
Held up, unable to secure clear run until 350m out, ran on well, heavily bumped 100m out and lost balance, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, driven along and outpaced early stages, raced in rear, ran on well final 200m.
Dropped out from wide draw, had to wait for run turning into home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on leaders.
Three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position final bend, gave ground in home straight.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to challenge.
Sluggish start, ridden along to press leader, struggled to hold position turning into home straight, gave ground final 300m.
Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from top of home straight, unable to quicken, flattened out final 200m.
Waited with towards rear, driven 600m out, lacked pace to challenge, never a factor.
Mid division, improved to track pace out wide without cover 1300m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
Showed good speed to lead, kicked 400m out, stayed on well, pressed by winner to line and just failed.
Settled in mid-field, struggled to hold position final bend, eased when detached 100m out.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, kept on same pace until approaching 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Slightly slow out, hampered shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Roarer.)
Began well, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, led by 1/2L turning in, hard ridden from 250M, finished off very strongly, really impressive.
Jumped well, raced prominently on the inside, 1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, 2-1/4L back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide from 800M, same margin back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made some progress after passing 300M, not enough room inside final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, there to turn, made no progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Pressed leader out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
Waited with in rear, headway halfway out against rail, stayed on for pressure in home straight.
Waited with towards rear, still in last place top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Shifted in and lost balance at start, tracked pace out wide without cover, hampered 400m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
Raced in rear, switched for clear run top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Raced in touch with leaders, shifted right and challenged up rail early in home straight, closed on winner late on but always held.
Three wide in mid-field, short of room turning into home straight, eased after blundered 450m out.
Settled in mid-field, switched 600m out, effort 500m out, stayed on but no further impression on front three late on.
Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from 400m out, stayed on but no match for front two.
Made all, showed speed to get across, kicked top of home straight, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
Raced in rear out wide, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to improve position, eased when detached 100m out.
Sluggish start, raced in touch with leaders, well placed into home straight, one paced and unable to reach leaders.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Out with rest, raced 2 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
On jumping made contact with the left side of its starting gate, raced at tail, still 8 lengths back in the middle stages, made some headway final 400M.
Fast into stride, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M but only showed limited response, kept on same pace to the line.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the stands' rail, passed some tired runners final 400M.
Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden from 300M but showed no response, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, peaked 500M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Lost left front plate.)
Began only fairly, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back in the middle stages, made good progress final 400M without threatening.
Began well from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, made good progress final 400M to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield, crowded near 650M, 4 lengths or so back in the middle stages, made no impression final 400M. (See Racing Incidents.)

On jumping was bumped heavily on the hindquarters and became unbalanced, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 350M, took the lead 150M, kept on very well to the line, won by 2 lengths.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the stands' side, peaked on run 350M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, peaked 300M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length at 400M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, commenced move after passing 350M, took the lead 250M, headed 150M, kept on well to take 2nd.
Prominent, quickened early in home straight to lead 300m out, stayed on well and in control final 100m.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, under pressure 500m out, stayed on well.
Waited with towards rear, still in rear top of home straight, left behind home straight.
Shifted out and bumped exiting stalls, in rear, ridden 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Raced in rear of mid-field, switched for clear run 300m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
Widest throughout without cover, struggled to hold position on bend, lost touch final 200m, well beaten.
Ridden along from stalls to get across, challenged by winner early in home straight, headed 300m out, stuck to task.
Three wide in mid-field, taken wider 500m out, tended to hang right in home straight, unable to improve position.
Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, gave ground final 200m.
Tracked leaders, switched wide for clear run 500m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Checked leaving stalls, rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 500m out, stayed on steadily.
Dropped out from wide draw, still in last place top of home straight, not best of runs in home straight, some late gains.
In rear after sluggish start, still in rear top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Settled in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
Settled handy, weakened quickly, never a danger.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, traveled smoothly, responded nicely when asked.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, gave ground gradually in the Straight.
Sat rear, traveled keenly, made some ground over the last 200M.
Settled handy, failed to respond under whip, never a threat.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled nicely, slightly weakened passing the 200M.
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, weakened passing 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, switched out rounding the Turn, hampered at the top of the Straight, not much progress made.
Sat in front of midfield, raced wide, ran on evenly.
Settled midfield, pressed on passing 600M, closed off strongly, had every chance.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, raced rear, no contention (Lame left fore).
Settled midfield, checked rounding the Turn when improved into doubtful room, ran on fairly.
Sat behind midfield, switched out entering the Straight, closed off okay.
In rear, raced on the outer away from stand rail, hung right under pressure from 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Waited with in rear, good headway from halfway, chased leader final 150m, unable to quite peg back that rival.
Taken across to make running against stand rail, ridden over 200m out, challenged final 100m, always doing enough to hold on.
Tracked pace, ridden 300m out, no extra and lost ground on leaders final 200m.
Raced prominently, outpaced by leaders final 200m.
Stumbled leaving stalls, recovered to track leading pair, weakened over 300m out, left behind.
Raced in touch, under pressure 350m out, soon left behind by principals.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, there to turn, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line, easily scored.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly until hampered near 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Reared on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear, travelled keenly in the early stages, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 8-1/2L back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, took the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 250M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover from 600M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, moved a little bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off okay without threatening.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, made some late ground.
Sat midfield on the rail, ran on okay.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, made minor progress.
Sat handy 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Showed good pace to lead, kept on but no threat to winner.
Sat towards the rear, never involved.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, unable to quickened.
Settled outside the lead, kept on nicely to score.
Sat midfield 2 wide, weakened in the Straight.
Sat at the rear, never a threat.
Caught 3 wide in front of midfield, raced greenly in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat box-seat, made no ground.
Sat near the rear, gave ground in the Straight. (Unacceptable performance, must trial).

Soon taken well behind from a poor draw trailing the field to straight, did not find much room on rail behind runners early in straight, running on when baulked again closing stages. (Tactic questioned)
Jumped awkwardly from a poor draw settling well back, shifted widest at the back into straight, produced good impression early in straight.
Settled in midfield on rail, kept on in home straight until fading steadily inside final 200M.
Held up very wide in last few without cover after beginning from a poor draw, travelling keenly and pulled closer very wide rounding home bend, one-paced in straight.
Always thereabouts, hit the front shortly after straightening and led until overhauled by fast-finishing winner 150M out.
Settled in rear, ran on steadily behind runners in straight despite not having the clearest of runs throughout.
Soon took up running on rail after moderate start, led until headed shortly after straightening, folded up quickly inside final 200M.
Settled in midfield, baulked for a run in home straight until over 250M out, ran on well under pressure to hit the front 150M out and soon drew clear.
Began well from the widest draw travelling 3-wide without cover in 4th or 3rd within 2L of pace, held every chance upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
Travelled wide without cover in midfield after moderate start, gained closer to 6th coming onto home bend, kept on early in straight until finding no extra inside final 250M.
Settled 3-wide in last few after moderate start, commenced move 600M out swinging wider into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish while hanging in.
Broke well but soon taken back to 5th just over 2L off the pace, shifted wider for a run entering straight but unable to quicken to challenge under pressure.
Held up in prominent position one off the leader, became 2L 4th rounding home bend on rail, kept on under pressure early in straight before finding no extra inside final 250M.

Jumped awkwardly losing round, soon taken across in rear and picked up to 8th 1100M out, steadied and lost position inside the 900M, snuck closer on home turn but baulked 400M out, fought on steadily to reach distant 3rd late.

Tracked leader in a race run at fast tempo, cruised to the lead passing 400M, soon quickened away and left his rivals trailing. Won with tremendous ease posting a Hong Kong record 18th successive victory in course record time.
Caught racing 3-wide behind midfield, couldn't go on passing 400M and dropped to last mid-straight. (No Vet findings.)
From inside draw moved up to chased leaders in a fast run race, couldn't keep up with superstar KA YING RISING on straightening, all out final 200M to hold 3rd.
Jumped well and reserved in midfield, battled on well to take 2nd near 150M but once again proved no match for champion KA YING RISING.
Jumped only fairly, held up along the fence in a position behind midfield, found disappointingly little in the straight and weakened away 300M. (No Vet findings.)
Not hurried early and middle stages, raced at the rear 6Ls off the fast pace, made some progress final 400M and just missed out on 3rd place. Soundly beaten by the winner KA YING RISING.
From wide draw taken back to the rear, brought wide for his challenge turning home, lay in under pressure and couldn't quicken enough to challenge.
Quickly into stride, led and set fast pace to the straight, headed passing 400M, held 2nd to about 150M, no extra close home.
In midfield early before moving closer to leaders from 1000M, caught racing wide no cover to the straight, run ended 300M and dropped out from contention.
Jumped on terms, given a waiting ride towards the rear, ran on mildly from 400M and wasn't beaten far by the placegetters.
Waited with towards rear, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, ran on strongly final 200m.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, chased leaders into home straight, no extra final 200m.
Shifted out and bumped exiting stalls, tracked leaders against rail, challenged up rail from 300m out, unable to quicken.
Held up last, switched and followed winner through 300m out, ran on well to close on winner but always held.
Settled in mid-field, smooth headway on bend, strong run to lead 200m out, on top from there.
Waited with in rear, pushed along 500m out, ran green, passed a few tiring rivals.
Crowded at start, raced in touch with leaders, driven 400m out, short of room final 150m, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, pressed leader, challenged leader top of home straight, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for room turning into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Jumped well, showed speed to get across, challenged by rivals early in home straight, weakened final 100m.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide at rear, angled out after passing 500M, made contact near 450M, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, angled out early in straight, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, made no progress in straight.

Clean jump, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, slightly improved on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Blundered start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, made some progress in straight.
Bumped on jumping, took the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
Slightly slow out and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Shifted in and heavily bumped out of stalls, mid division, under pressure on bend to chase leaders, stayed on steadily.
Waited with in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
Tracked pace, moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, sticking to task, lost second on line.
Raced in touch with leaders, short of room early in home straight, switched for clear run 200m out, ran on well but no threat to winner.
Rail position in mid-field, effort 500m out, left behind home straight.
Raced in rear of mid-field, ridden top of home straight, unable to improve position.
Ridden along from stalls to race prominently, challenged leader top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
Driven along and outpaced early stages, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Three wide in rear of mid-field without cover, struggled to hold position on bend, eased when detached 200m out.
Heavily bumped and checked leaving stalls, in rear, under pressure 600m out, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 400m out, stayed on for pressure, weakened close home.
Shifted out and heavily bumped exiting stalls, settled in mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 300m out.
Held up last, still in last pair turning into home straight, no impression.
Showed good speed to lead, keen early stages, three lengths clear 800m out, margin reduced turning into home straight, quickened early in home straight and soon in command.
Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, stumbled near 350M, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Blood in trachea.) (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well from gate 10, raced in 2nd early, sat right behind the leader after passing 650M, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 50M, headed close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Began well from the widest draw, raced prominently but trapped 3 wide, 2 wide from 700M, 1-1/4L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 350M, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside early, moved a bit closer after entering the back straight, peaked near 400M, weakened early in straight.
Average to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off very strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Settled in rear of mid-field, ridden 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders late but always held.
Waited with towards rear, switched for clear run 300m out, tight for room final 50m, unable to be ridden out to finish.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
Dropped out from widest draw, three wide without cover, hung in final 200m, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Bumped out of stalls, raced in rear, ridden top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Bumped leaving stalls, prominent, driven to chase leader 400m out, gave ground final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, chased along final bend, weakened quickly home straight.
Made all, showed good speed to get across, kicked 300m out, in control final 100m, won readily.
In rear after sluggish start, pushed along widest into home straight, unable to improve position.
Fast break, tracked leaders against rail, chased along final bend, one paced under pressure.
Tracked leaders, good headway final bend to chase leaders, sustained headway to challenge 300m out, stayed on but no threat to winner.
Rail position in mid-field, keen middle stages, ran green, never going pace to get competitive.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, traveled nicely, had every chance.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, finished last, not much impression.
Sat midfield early, raced wide in the early stages and went forward to chase the leader, weakened from 200M.
Ridden along to lead, traveled comfortably, closed off strongly (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, pressed on near the 700M, responded reasonably well when asked (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, improved into a tight run over the concluding stages, could not be fully tested.
Outpaced early, in rear, pushed along halfway, in last pair entering home straight, stayed on well final 150m.
Prominent early, tracking leaders halfway, struggling to hold position final bend, soon weakened.
Tracked pace, raced wide to final bend, improved to hold every chance 150m out, no extra final 50m.
Rear of mid-field, taken wide and forward move turning into home straight, sustained run to lead 150m out, ran on well.
Mid-field, rail position, forced to angle wide in home straight to challenge, stayed on, got up for second close home.
Won early battle for lead and set good pace, headed 150m out, no extra.
Wide early from high draw, taken forward to press leader by halfway, weakened 200m out.
Tracked pace, no extra and lost ground final 150m.
Slowly away, recovered but towards rear. Pushed along 300m out, no real impression, ran out of room final 50m.
Keen early, settled in mid-field, forward move wide final bend, challenged 150m out, unable to sustain effort.
Prominent early, caught behind weakening runner from halfway and shuffled back to rear by top of home straight, no impression under pressure.
Dropped in from high draw, raced in last place, headway final 150m, never going pace to get competitive.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, made some progress early in straight, peaked approaching 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place without threatening.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Began well, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, peaked approaching 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Jumped nicely, sent forward to lead, kept on strongly to score.
Sat last, never a threat.
Sat at the rear 2 wide, stayed on strongly late.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, picked off a few weakened rivals.
Sat midfield on the rail, angled out near the 250M, made some late ground.
Sat near the rear 3 wide, never involved.
Sat towards the rear on the rail, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind the leaders, switched out in the Straight, ran on nicely, run peaked at the 100M.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely, just one pace final 75M.
Sat handy 3 wide no cover, only one pace when asked.
Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat outside the leader, kept on fairly.
Began awkwardly from the widest draw settling well behind, commenced move 3-wide from over 400M out to be widest into straight, ran on well and did best work late.
Broke well settling just off over 2L off the pace in 4th on rail, became 3L 5th into back straight but saved ground turning in for home, ran on under pressure to reach distant 2nd final strides.

Settled in midfield on rail , drifted slightly further back passing the 600M, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend, angled out to be 5L joint-7th into straight, fought on steadily and did best work late.
Settled towards rear on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran on without threatening.
Settled at the back from a wide draw and waited with, made up good ground under pressure in home straight though never threatening.
Took up running passing the winning post the first time after beginning from a poor draw, led on rail from over 1200M out setting a sound pace, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 100M.
Well there from a middle draw before taken one back 2-wide, held up in 3rd just off the pace before drifting further away from pace 500M out, gradually faded in straight.
Well there early niggling along, just over 2L back in 4th into back straight, came under pressure rounding home bend, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Pressed forward from a poor draw settling 1L back 3-wide in back straight, kept on from a similar position into home straight before dropping out tamely 100M out.
Settled in midfield, gained 6th into back straight about 4L back, swung one of the widest into straight, responded well inside final 200M to hit the front 100M out and soon kicked clear.
Never a factor.
Settled towards rear, carried wide into straight, kept on steadily in the run to the line.
Went forward, emerged as leader 850M, pressed by rival middle stages, hung on to the lead until passing 200M, weakened rapidly late stages.
Raced in midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, wide into straight then picked up strongly to score.
Settled behind midfield, kept to inside on straightening, closed off well to take 2nd.
Slow out, in detached rear and never involved. Finished tailed out. (No Vet findings.)
From wide draw went forward to race outside the lead, no extra passing 250M, weakened towards the line.
Bumped on jumping, failed to show sufficient pace going forward and ended up behind midfield, failed to gain ground on leaders final 300M. (Jockey - travelled only fairly during the event.)
Unable to slot in from draw 7, caught racing wide no cover behind midfield, responded mildly to pressure passing 300M, stayed on without posing serious threat to leaders.
Dropped back to a rearward spot after the jump, driven along 500M, closed off steadily down the outside but had too much to make on leaders.
Bumped on jumping, settled in mid-division never far off from leaders, ran on pleasingly final 300m for 3rd.
Jumped awkwardly, in midfield early stages before dropping back towards the rear, brought wide into straight but the finishing response was just fair.
Jumped on terms, up with pace early stages before easing back to a trailing spot behind leaders, fought hard in the straight but couldn't muster the pace to challenge.
Fast away, led early stages before taking up a trailing spot behind leader, fought on steadily turning home to finish a creditable 4th.
Rail position in mid-field, chased along final bend, gave ground final 100m.
Settled in mid-field, struggled to hold position final bend, eased once well held.
Slowly into stride, driven along and outpaced early stages, challenged up rail from 300m out, stayed on well to close on leaders.
Prominent, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, stayed on well and in control final 100m.
Raced in last pair after sluggish start and lost ground, last place entering home straight, no impression.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, raced keenly, raced very wide throughout, not beaten far.
Showed good speed to lead, pressed by winner final bend, headed 250m out, sticking to task.
Bumped out of stalls, dropped out from wide draw, had to wait for run turning into home straight, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, ran on strongly.
Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, got across to track leaders, followed winner through 300m out, stayed on well but always held.
Three wide in mid-field without cover, driven 400m out to chase leaders, unable to get on terms with leaders.
Tracked leaders against rail, unable to secure clear run until final 100m, lacked pace to challenge.
Held up last after crowded at start, still in rear top of home straight, ran on well final 200m.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began smartly from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, found rail 1050M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 13, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 450M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, 2 wide from 1000M, 1/2L back turning in, peaked 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Waited with towards rear, still in rear top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
Raced in touch with leaders, angled off rail from 500m out for clear run, one paced under pressure.
Settled in mid-field, some headway on bend, sustained headway to challenge 300m out, ran on well final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, under pressure 800m out to chase leaders, stayed on well to close on leaders in home straight.
Pressed leader, chased leader into home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m.
Dropped out from widest draw, three wide without cover, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
Bumped out of stalls, across to track leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, strong run to get up on line.
Crowded at start, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 500m out, well held from 300m out.
Sluggish start and lost ground, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
Showed good speed to lead, kicked 350m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
Waited with in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, unable to challenge.
Rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, gave ground in home straight.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, hung in in the Straight (Substantial blood in the trachea, See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish
Settled midfield, raced wide with cover, closed off fairly.
Settled behind midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, limited response when asked.
Slow to jump, sat behind midfield, minor progress made when asked.
Jumped only fairly, sat handy, kept on well to hold 2nd
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, slightly weakened passing 150M.
Settled worse than midfield, raced keenly, never a threat.
Sat rear, had difficulty obtaining clear running int he Straight, not much impression made (See Incident Report).
