Raced in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Forced wider on the track early stages and shuffled back to last 8Ls or so off the leader, made up several places out wide 800m out, soon tired out early in the straight.
Began awkwardly and sat prominent outside the leader, overraced in the early stages, failed to sustain his run and compounded rapidly at the straight.
Away okay and restrained early to be 3 wide with cover, with the slow pace commenced a long wide surging run around 800m, knuckled down to the task in the final stages to get the job done.
Began fast and dictated things in front, run peaked 150m out and knocked up quickly.
One of the quickest away and positioned 5th one off the rail, came under pressure over final stages and was relatively one-paced to the finish.
Jumped on terms and settled on the leader's back on the rail, switched towards the middle part of the track final stages and stayed on fairly well.
Dragged back to near last from an awkward draw, came from well back with 6Ls to make up at the 400M and made some inroads.
Began swiftly and tracked pace, unable to slot in and face the breeze throughout, momentarily struck the front 150m out and boxed on solidly, despite a tough run.
Slow into stride and sat midfield the fence, saved ground throughout and travelled to the line okay when asked.
Inconvenienced and taken wider in the first turn, sat 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield throughout, showed minor response over the final stages.
Tightened for room after a slow getaway, swooped late despite laying in over the final stages.
Out with them and settled midfield 5Ls off the leader, responded nicely to jockey's strong urgings to feature in the placings.
Tracked leading pair, angled off rail over 300m out, stayed on, lacked pace to trouble winner.
Made running, pressed on turning into home straight, headed 150m out, no extra final 100m.
Dropped in from wide draw, raced in last pair, pushed along final bend, stayed on late, never dangerous.
Waited with towards rear, under pressure from 400m out, no impression.
Tracked pace three wide, pushed along over 400m out, checked briefly 300m out, soon weakened.
Mid-field, in touch with leaders top of home straight, unable to quicken.
Hampered leaving stalls, mid-field, keen mid-race, pushed along 300m out, one paced.
Dropped in from wide draw, raced in last pair, never involved.
Raced prominently, challenged 300m out, led 150m out, in control final 50m and comfortable winner.
Waited with from wide draw, keen early, headway wide final bend, stayed on, did best of those held up.
Mid-field, ridden and lost ground final bend, hung left, little impression after.
Mid-division, pushed along final bend, no extra final 200m.

Bumped heavily shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 400M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room in straight, weakened final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Shifted out at start, raced towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, still last turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Sat midfield 2 wide, angled out rounding the home turn, ran on okay.
Sat handy 2 wide, run peaked at 100M.
Sat at the rear 3 wide, took some time to respond, did made some late ground. (Substantial blood)
Sat midfield 3 wide no cover, gave ground in the Straight.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, raced greenly, never impress. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on only fairly.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely when asked.
Taken back to last from a wide draw, picked off a few weakened rivals.
Showed good speed to lead, weakened in the Straight.
Sat behind midfield, made minor progress.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled towards the rear, made ground near the rail. (See Incident Report)
Crowded at start after beginning from a wide barrier settling well back, made no impression in home straight.
Soon taken back behind midfield in 9th from a wide barrier, did not find much room in home straight racing in a tight run inside final 100M, did best work late.
Settled in midfield on the rail, came under pressure home bend, saved ground within 3L of pace into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Pressed forward to reach 2nd making first turn, chased the leaders into home straight holding every chance until finding no extra inside final 50M.
Soon took up running on the rail setting a sound pace, angled out on straightening and hung on well under pressure in front until swamped final few strides.
Jumped best, gradually taken back to settle in 2L 5th 2-wide, baulked behind runners on straightening and switched out for a run 250M out, produced good late impression closing stages.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Soon dropped to midfield despite niggled at early, commenced move 400M out swinging one of the widest into straight, kept on until finding no extra inside final 100M.
Settled towards rear, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran on well under pressure to claim victory final strides.

Travelled wide throughout after beginning from a wide barrier, improved steadily from towards rear to reach 2L 4th in back straight 800M out, drifted wider into straight and soon weakened out of contention.
Settled within 2L of pace in 3rd on the rail, saved ground turning in for home but unable to sustain effort shortly upon straightening.

In last few after beginning from the widest barrier, jockey reported lost use of iron briefly, improved steadily in back straight to reach midfield 4-wide onto home bend, even wider turning in for home, soon weakened on straightening.
Dropped back form wide draw to race in a position near last, wide into straight but couldn't quite finish off in the straight. (Jockey : disadvantaged by settling back in the field.)
Jumped only fairly, ended up in last 6-7Ls off leader, could not muster any sort of challenge in the straight.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, settled near last about 5Ls back, lacked a finishing response in the straight. Never involved.
Quickly away, crossed to the fence and settled just off leader, kept battling in the straight to stay in contention but was always held by leaders final 200M.
Pressed forward to be racing in 2nd, fought on one paced in the straight before weakening out of contention final 100M.
Crowded for room after the start, raced in midfield further back than intended, refused to settle throughout early and middle stages, failed to close off the race on straightening.
Showed customary early speed to lead, kept going well passing 300M, was strongly challenged by rival late stages but managed to hold on.
Jumped only fairly, raced keenly in the early and middle stages and refused to settle, couldn't quicken enough in the straight, no extra final 200M.
Held up behind midfield, 4-5Ls off leader 400M, ran on steadily towards the line for non-threatening 5th.
Jumped awkwardly, restrained in mid-division along the fence, close enough to leaders passing 300M, did best work late and was nearest at the finish.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide position without cover, challenged hard for the lead from 300M but couldn't quite get past leader, lost 2nd closing stages.
Bumped leaving stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to challenge.
Rail position in mid-field, ridden to hold position from 500m out, no extra final 200m.
Tracked leaders, quickened 400m out to lead 250m out, ran on well but headed by winner close home.
Bumped out of stalls, mid division, followed winner through 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Prominent, ridden to chase leader 500m out, struggled to hold position in home straight, flattened out final 100m.
Dropped out from wide draw, struggled to hold position from 600m out, soon well held.
Bumped shortly after start, tracked leaders against rail, angled out to make run top of home straight, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
Waited with towards rear, challenged up rail from 200m out, ran on well to make up several places.
Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, showed good speed to lead, headed 250m out, weakened close home.
Raced in touch with leaders against rail, driven 500m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 300m out.
Settled in mid-field, followed runner-up through 300m out, strong run to lead close home.
Dropped out from widest draw, pushed along widest into home straight, unable to improve position.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened thereafter.
Out in line, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight, won comfortably.
Began awkwardly and made contact, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, made good progress in straight to take a place without threatening the first two.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 3 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, hard ridden from 500M but showed no response, weakened and eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, commenced move after passing 600M, 2 to 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Settled in rear of mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, never involved.
Prominent, struggled to hold position on bend, dropped away quickly in home straight.
Waited with towards rear, dropped to last place top of home straight, no impression.
Raced in touch with leaders, switched wider for clear run 200m out, one paced under pressure.
Three wide in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, no extra final 200m.
Crowded shortly after start, rail position in rear of mid-field, challenged up rail from 350m out, stayed on well.
Held up last, still in rear top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, stayed on steadily.
Tracked pace out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, not beaten far.
Fast break, ridden from stalls to lead, kicked 350m out, headed by winner 200m out, stuck to task.
Rail position in mid-field, followed winner through 400m out, ran on well final 200m but no match for winner.
Tracked leaders against rail, keen middle stages, quickened early in home straight to lead 200m out, on top from there.
Sat on pace, traveled nicely, was hampered over the concluding stages, closed off okay.
Settled in front of midfield, raced very wide until 600M, gave ground passing 350M.
Jumped awkwardly, sat worse than midfield, minor progress made in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, raced wide, one pace to the line (See Incident Report).
Settled handy on the rail, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Settled midfield, weakened quickly near the 300M, not much impression made.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled greenly, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the early Straight, showed dash over the final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly, ridden along to lead, kept on fairly well (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, raced very wide from 600M, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat behind midfield, held up over the concluding stages.
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, held up at the top of the Straight and again over the final 50M, could not be fully tested.
Settled rear, raced keenly in the early stages, was held up for clear running until 300M, responded well when asked.
Wide throughout, made contact with rival when improving into contention on bend, weakened 200m out.
Tracked leader, hard ridden top of home straight, maintained position until no extra final 100m.
Made running, pressed on 400m out, headed 200m out, no extra.
Dropped out last from wide draw, hung right under pressure 400m out, good headway final 200m, ran on strongly.
Waited with in rear, headway and in touch with leaders when running out of room under 150m out, unable to be ridden out after.
Tracked pace, made contact with rival when improving on bend, challenged from top of home straight, unable to sustain effort and faded final 150m.
Tracked leader, improved to lead 200m out, headed 75m out, no extra.
Checked early after sluggish start, recovered to race in mid-field, short of room between horses early in home straight and had to switch, burst through to lead 75m out and soon on top, won readily.
Waited with in rear, struggling and left behind final 200m.
Held up in rear, ridden 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to trouble leaders, briefly tight for room 100m out.
Mid-field, stuck to inside rail, under pressure over 300m out, unable to quicken, weakened final 150m.
Keen in mid-field, wide from halfway, under pressure 300m out, weakened.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 450M, 7 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved closer after passing 600M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, found rail near 1000M, saved ground on turn, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Moderately away from gate 13, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 2 wide after entering the back straight, commenced move 600M, 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight, finished tailed out.

Began awkwardly and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear gradually after passing 700M, 6-1/2L back turning in, weakened and eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear, 10 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, commenced move approaching 600M, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (2nd last start.)
Made contact with the right side of its starting gate on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, 9 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 2 wide from 900M, 6 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat on pace near the outside rail, no extra final 2 furlongs.
Showed good speed to lead 2 off the outside rail, kept on nicely, just held on.
Sat handy, weakened final 400M.
Sat on pace 3 from the stands' rail, kept on.
Sat last, stayed on late.
Sat towards the rear center track, stayed on well.
Jumped nicely, settled midfield 3 off the stands' rail, closed off strongly to score.
Sat in front of midfield 3 off the stands' rail, hampered at the 200M, never seriously tested.
Sat midfield on the stands' rail, no clear run until 150M, ran on nicely late.
Sat midfield, closed off fairly.
Sat near the rear near center, held up until 350M, made good late ground.
Sat midfield, checked at 150M, never involved afterwards.
Sat near the rear on the rail, lay in and never seriously tested, did made some late ground.
Settled well behind and waited with, baulked for a run early in straight until over 250M out, quickened well to snatch victory final strides.
Pressed forward to soon join the leaders, gradually shifted 2L back to 4th onto first turn, kept on well without quickening from a similar position into straight.
Slowly away, soon recovered on rail to rear of midfield, carried backward for a couple lengths rounding home bend dropping towards rear, baulked upon straightening until the 200M, ran home one-paced.

Prominent early from a low draw, gradually drifted backward to midfield approaching first turn, baulked for a run just inside the 400M, quickened well to hit the front over 100M out only to be collared final strides.
Held early lead from a low draw, led until headed over 1000M out, carried backward to 3L 6th onto home bend, forced to check 300M out, produced some late impression close to home.

Soon taken back from a wide barrier settling in rear on rail, met minor interferences 800M out, saved ground on rail turning in for home, shifted out for a run on straightening, produced good late impression.
Slightly slow out settling in last few, bumped 400M out upon straightening, ran on steadily but unable to sustain effort close to finish.
Travelled wide with cover behind midfield, in similar position into straight, soon faded under pressure.

Close up on rail early, carried backward losing a couple of lengths onto first turn, midfield rounding home bend but snuck back up after straightening, making good ground when running into heels and checked 150M out, never recovered.
Travelled very wide with some cover in midfield, came under pressure approaching final turn, folded up quickly upon straightening.
Began from a wide barrier, gradually taken back to wide in last few, widest runner turning for home, ran on past well-beaten horses down the centre of home straight.
Pressed forward from the widest barrier, took up running 3-wide onto first turn obtaining rails run 750M out, maintained fast tempo in front until the 400M and led until weakened 150M out.
Prominent very wide with cover early stages, one back 2-wide in 2nd rounding home bend, faded under pressure out of contention inside final 250M.
Shared early lead, settled one back in 3rd on rail rounding home bend, baulked for a run early in straight, found no extra when checked 150M out.
Settled near last about 6Ls off the pace, kept to inside on straightening, was making good progress when running to the back of the eventual winner near 100M. Could have finished closer.
Dropped back from draw 1 to race in midfield, had over 4Ls to make up 400M but couldn't muster the speed to challenge..
Jumped only fairly, settled further back in the field than intended, near last turning for home, stayed on without posing serious threat to leaders.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, raced as the back-marker 7-8Ls off leader, struggled to pick up pace when driven along 500M, failed to improve position. (Roarer.)
Settled behind midfield 3-wide, pace very slow in the first half of the race, couldn't improve position when driven along home turn, never dangerous.
Soon led, set slow pace early stages before quickening up the tempo midway, fought on to hold lead until nearing 100M. No extra late stages.
Stayed close to leaders but raced wide without cover for the majority of the race, hard driven from 450M, responded well to be challenging for the lead final stages, held by first two at the line.
From wide draw slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, 4-5Ls to make up 400M, ran on steadily to the line.
Reserved in mid-division 4Ls off leader, couldn't go on passing 300M. Never reach contention. (Jockey fined for returning 3lbs overweight.)
Raced in a handy spot behind leaders, well placed to strike 400M, fought well to wrestle the lead 100M out, all out final stages just couldn't hold off winner near line.
Jumped only fairly, in midfield along the fence early stages, moved within striking distance home turn, loomed behind leaders mid-straight before proving too strong near line.
Positively ridden, settled just outside the lead, fought hard to stay in contention from 400M, still with leaders 100M before run came to an end and faded.
Slowly away and lost ground, raced in rear, challenged up rail from 300m out, never dangerous.
Disputed led early stages, led outright 800m out, challenged by winner top of home straight, headed 200m out, weakened final 100m.
Bumped out of stalls, raced in rear, switched top of home straight, unable to improve position.
Waited with towards rear, short of room early in home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
Settled in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders but always held.
Bumped leaving stalls, held up last, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on well, crowded closing stages and unable to be ridden out to finsih,
Raced wide without cover, chased along early, dropped away quickly in home straight, eased once well held.
Raced in touch with leaders against rail, angled out for clear run 300m out, ran on well to close on winner, lost out only narrowly.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, keen middle stages, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
Disputed led early stages, pressed leader middle stages, quickened early in home straight to lead 200m out, pressed by runner-up to line and just prevailed.
Raced in touch with leaders out wide, pushed along wide into home straight, no extra final 200m.
Tracked pace out wide, ridden top of home straight, faded final 200m.
Tracked leaders, well placed into home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m.
Rail position in mid-field, under pressure to hold position middle stages, short of room early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, made contact and unbalanced near 250M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, checked near 250M, kept on same pace to the line.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Began well from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield but trapped 3 wide, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Laceration to the right hind leg.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening the first few.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced 3 wide towards rear, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest finish. (Bled.)
Bumped shortly after start, showed good speed to lead, challenged by rivals top of home straight, gave ground final 150m.
Rail position in rear of mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, left behind home straight.
Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 400m out, ran on well to lead 250m out, headed by winner 100m out.
Rail position in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on but unable to reach leaders.
Dropped out from widest draw, shuffled back, still in last place turning into home straight, strong run final 200m, just failed.
Tracked leaders, challenged leaders early in home straight, no extra final 200m.
Crowded and bumped shortly after start, raced in rear, wide into home straight, struggling.
Driven along and outpaced early stages, still in rear top of home straight, some late gains.
Settled in mid-field, ridden to hold position middle stages, lacked pace to challenge.
Raced in touch with leaders, under pressure 500m out to chase leaders, ran on well to lead 100m out, pressed by runner-up to line and just held on.
Raced wide, improved to press leader 900m out, pressed on 300m out, unable to pick up for pressure.
Crowded and checked shortly after start, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, no impression.
